:root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#0066cc;--pale:#eef5fb;--border:#c5daea;--bg:#f5f9fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,102,204,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,102,204,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack J&J's original daily hydrogel lens in a 90-lens 3-month supply — LACREON® Technology for consistent all-day moisture in the most accessible daily lens format. ✦ Daily Disposable90 Lenses / BoxLACREON® TechnologyEtafilcon ABC 8.5 & 9.0 mm DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 28Dk/t O₂ 58%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack provides Johnson & Johnson Vision's trusted daily hydrogel lens in a 90-lens 3-month supply box — available at contactlens365.com. The same proven LACREON® Technology, etafilcon A material, and comfort performance as the 30-pack, in the most cost-efficient daily format for committed daily wearers. 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist has been one of the world's most widely prescribed daily contact lenses for many years — a position built on the consistency of LACREON® Technology and the accessible performance of etafilcon A hydrogel. LACREON® embeds a moisture-retaining agent directly into the lens material itself, locking it in so that it cannot be removed by blinking, tear film interaction, or rubbing. This approach — integrating the wetting agent into the polymer rather than coating the surface — delivers comfort levels that remain remarkably consistent from insertion to removal, without the mid-day comfort decline associated with surface coatings on competing products. The 90-pack is the best-value format for committed daily wearers — providing 3 months per eye at a better cost per lens than the 30-pack, with fewer reorder transactions and consistent supply security. The power range of –12.00 to +8.00 D with BC options of 8.5 mm and 9.0 mm covers a wide spectrum of prescriptions and corneal geometries. Class 2 UV protection provides meaningful daily solar defence. 💧 LACREON® Technology locks moisture into the lens material — not just the surface. Consistent daily comfort in J&J's most widely prescribed daily lens, in the best-value 90-lens supply format. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Etafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 58% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm and 9.0 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 28 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technology LACREON® Technology A moisture-retaining agent embedded directly into the etafilcon A material — not a surface coating. Locked into the polymer matrix so it cannot be removed by blinking or tear film interaction, providing consistent moisture throughout the full wearing day. One of the most tested and trusted daily lens moisture technologies available. Etafilcon A A 58% water content non-ionic hydrogel that provides a naturally soft, moist on-eye feel. Extensive clinical safety record accumulated over decades of use. Non-ionic formulation reduces protein deposit attraction compared to ionic hydrogels. Who Is It For? 💰Best-Value Daily Wearers The 90-pack delivers 3 months per eye at a better cost per lens than the 30-pack — ideal for committed daily wearers who want supply security and value. 🌟Everyday Daily Wearers Consistent LACREON® Technology comfort in the world's most widely prescribed daily lens — proven performance for everyday wearing routines. ✈️Travellers No solution, no case — stock up with a 90-pack and travel without lens care accessories. Open, wear, discard. 🏃Active Lifestyles Fresh daily lens every day — no cleaning routine required. The 90-pack ensures you always have supply available for gym sessions, sport, and active daily use. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 90 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. 1 day acuvue moist 90 packacuvue moist daily 90lacreon technology 90 packetafilcon a 90 packcontactlens365acuvue moist 90 specsdaily hydrogel 90 packbest value daily lens This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } CooperVision · Biofinity contactlens365.com Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack CooperVision's premium monthly multifocal for presbyopia — Balanced Progressive™ Technology and naturally wettable Aquaform® Technology for clear near, intermediate, and distance vision month-long. ✦ Monthly Multifocal6 Lenses / BoxBalanced Progressive™Aquaform® TechnologyComfilcon A · Dk/t 160 MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 160Dk/t O₂ 48%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack is CooperVision's premium monthly multifocal contact lens for presbyopia — available at contactlens365.com. Combining the proven Comfilcon A silicone hydrogel with Aquaform® Technology for naturally wettable month-long comfort, Biofinity® Multifocal adds Balanced Progressive™ Technology — a D-shaped aspheric multifocal design available in both near-centre ('D' design) and distance-centre ('N' design) options — to provide clear, comfortable vision at all distances for a wide range of presbyopic wearers. Balanced Progressive™ Technology in the multifocal context uses a front aspheric surface design that distributes near, intermediate, and distance power across the lens in a graduated pattern. The availability of both 'D' (dominant distance) and 'N' (dominant near) versions gives eye care professionals significant flexibility in prescribing a monovision-style approach — typically fitting the dominant eye with the 'D' design for distance priority and the non-dominant eye with the 'N' design for near priority — or fitting the same design in both eyes depending on the patient's  and visual requirements. This modified monovision approach, when fitted correctly, provides excellent functional vision at all distances while maintaining binocular vision and depth perception better than full monovision correction. Aquaform® Technology ensures that the multifocal optical design can be appreciated fully throughout the monthly cycle without comfort or moisture compromising visual quality. The 48% water content and Dk/t 160 of Comfilcon A are the same material properties that make the spherical Biofinity® one of the world's most prescribed monthly lenses — applied here to the multifocal design with the same naturally wettable, coating-free performance that monthly wearers have trusted for years. At contactlens365.com, Biofinity® Multifocal is available in 'D' and 'N' designs across a comprehensive range of SPH and ADD values for prompt dispatch. ✦ Balanced Progressive™ Technology offers 'D' (distance-centre) and 'N' (near-centre) designs — giving eye care professionals the flexibility to optimise multifocal correction for each individual patient's  and visual demands. Same proven Aquaform® Technology as spherical Biofinity®. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Comfilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 48% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 160 UV Protection None Sphere (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D ADD Options +1.00 to +3.00 D (0.50 D steps) Design Options 'D' (distance-centre) / 'N' (near-centre) Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technologies Balanced Progressive™ Technology An aspheric multifocal design available in 'D' (distance-centre) and 'N' (near-centre) versions. Gives prescribers the flexibility to optimise each eye's vision priority — typically D/N modified monovision for best all-distance functional performance. Reduces spherical aberration to improve low-light and night vision quality. Aquaform® Technology Naturally wettable Comfilcon A — hydrophilic chains throughout the polymer create intrinsic wettability without surface coatings. Consistent month-long moisture and surface behaviour so the multifocal design performs at its best from day 1 to day 30 without comfort interference. D vs N Design: Which Is Right for You? Your eye care professional determines the appropriate design combination. As a guide: the 'D' design is distance-centre, prioritising distance and intermediate vision — typically fitted to the dominant eye. The 'N' design is near-centre, prioritising near and reading vision — typically fitted to the non-dominant eye. The combined effect provides clear functional vision at all distances while maintaining binocular vision and depth perception. D DESIGN Distance-Centre Distance and intermediate priority — typically dominant eye. Driving, distance viewing, and screen work at arm's length. N DESIGN Near-Centre Near and reading priority — typically non-dominant eye. Reading, phone use, and close work tasks. ADD RANGE +1.00 to +3.00 D ADD values in 0.50 D steps covering early to advanced presbyopia — broader ADD range than many competing monthly multifocals. ADAPTATION 1–2 Week Period Wear both lenses consistently during adaptation. Neural adaptation to the D/N asymmetric design typically takes 1–2 weeks — do not abandon the lens before completing adaptation. Who Is It For? 👓Presbyopia Wearers D/N design flexibility allows the eye care professional to optimise the multifocal correction for each individual — better all-distance performance than fixed-design monthly multifocals for most presbyopic wearers. 📱Reading Glass Avoiders D/N modified monovision provides reading capability without switching to glasses — one monthly lens for all daily vision tasks. 💧Month-Long Comfort Priority Aquaform® Technology's naturally wettable Comfilcon A performs consistently from day 1 to day 30 — no coating-related comfort decline in the second half of the month. 🌙Extended Wear Option Dk/t 160 and up to 6 nights continuous wear when professionally  — same extended wear potential as spherical Biofinity® in a multifocal design. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Biofinity® Multifocal 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,122,94,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,122,94,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid Disposable6 Lenses / BoxAquaform® TechnologyComfilcon ADk/t 160 · 48% Water MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 160Dk/t O₂ 48%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision Biofinity® Contact Lenses 6 Pack is one of the world's most prescribed monthly silicone hydrogel lenses — available at contactlens365.com. Built on Comfilcon A with Aquaform® Technology, Biofinity® delivers outstanding performance across the full 30-day replacement cycle: Dk/t 160 for excellent corneal oxygen supply, 48% water content for genuine comfort, and a naturally wettable surface that requires no external coatings to maintain its performance throughout the monthly cycle. For many eye care professionals and wearers, Biofinity® represents the optimal balance of oxygen performance, water content, and comfort in the monthly silicone hydrogel category. Aquaform® Technology is the core innovation that differentiates Biofinity® from conventional silicone hydrogel designs. Traditional silicone hydrogel lenses use hydrophobic silicone polymer as their oxygen-transport medium, which requires surface coatings — typically plasma surface  — to achieve adequate tear film wettability. These coatings, while initially effective, can degrade over the wearing day and over the monthly replacement cycle as they are eroded by the mechanical action of blinking and by chemical interactions with tear film proteins and lipids. Aquaform® Technology takes a fundamentally different approach: it produces a silicone hydrogel where hydrophilic (water-loving) polymer chains are integrated throughout the Comfilcon A matrix, creating a material that is naturally wettable from the core outward without requiring external coatings. This intrinsic wettability is stable throughout the full 30-day replacement cycle — the material behaves the same in week four as it did in week one, because the wettability is in the material itself rather than on a removable surface layer. The Comfilcon A material at 48% water content and Dk/t 160 occupies an excellent position on the moisture-oxygen performance curve for monthly lenses. The 48% water provides a perceptibly moist, comfortable feel throughout the wearing day; the Dk/t 160 provides corneal oxygen supply well above the thresholds for safe daily wear and supports professional- extended wear up to 6 nights. At contactlens365.com, the full Biofinity® parameter range is stocked for prompt dispatch — all powers, both base curves (8.6 mm), diameter 14.0 mm. 🧬 Aquaform® Technology makes Comfilcon A inherently wettable — no surface coatings required, no performance degradation over the monthly cycle. The same naturally moist surface from day 1 to day 30. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Comfilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 48% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 160 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technology Aquaform® Technology Hydrophilic polymer chains integrated throughout the Comfilcon A silicone hydrogel matrix — creating a material that is naturally wettable from the core, not just surface-treated. No coatings to degrade, no performance cliff in weeks 3 or 4. Moisture and wettability remain consistent throughout the full 30-day replacement cycle. Comfilcon A CooperVision's proven monthly silicone hydrogel polymer: 48% water content, Dk/t 160. Sits at an optimal position on the monthly lens performance curve — high enough water for genuine comfort feel, high enough Dk/t for excellent corneal oxygen supply, and the Aquaform® Technology makes it naturally wettable without external coatings. Who Is It For? 💧Month-Long Comfort Seekers Naturally wettable Aquaform® Technology — consistent moisture from day 1 to day 30 without the coating-degradation comfort decline that affects other monthly SiHy designs. 🌙Extended Wear Option Dk/t 160 supports up to 6 nights continuous wear when professionally  — one of the highest-oxygen monthly lenses for  extended wear patients. 💻Screen & Office Workers Naturally wettable surface and 48% water content support comfort through long screen-based days throughout the full monthly replacement period. 🏃Active Monthly Wearers Biofinity® performs well for active wearers — Dk/t 160, robust Aquaform® moisture, and a wide power range make it one of the most versatile monthly lenses available. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Biofinity® Contact Lenses 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Biofinity® Contact Lenses 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Biofinity® Contact Lenses 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Biofinity® Contact Lenses 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#005b8e;--pale:#e3f0f8;--border:#90c4e0;--bg:#f0f7fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,91,142,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,91,142,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · Air Optix Night & Day AQUA contactlens365.com Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack Alcon's continuous wear monthly lens — Dk/t 175, the highest oxygen transmissibility in a monthly contact lens, FDA- for up to 30 nights of continuous wear. ✦ Continuous Wear / Monthly6 Lenses / BoxDk/t 175 Highest O₂30 Night ApprovalSMARTSHIELD® ContinuousWear Option 6Lenses / Box 175Dk/t O₂ 24%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack is the world's highest-oxygen-transmissibility monthly contact lens — available at contactlens365.com. With Dk/t 175 (the highest of any  monthly lens), FDA approval for up to 30 nights of continuous wear, and SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance, Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA is the lens of choice for wearers who require, or whose eye care professional has , genuine extended or continuous wear. It represents the pinnacle of silicone hydrogel oxygen performance for scheduled lens replacement formats. The extraordinary Dk/t 175 of Lotrafilcon A — the material behind Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA — is achieved through an architecture that places oxygen supply as the primary design priority. With only 24% water content (among the lowest in the category), Lotrafilcon A relies almost entirely on silicone-phase oxygen transport rather than water-phase diffusion — silicone has inherently higher oxygen permeability than water, so the reduced water content actually enables the high Dk/t performance. The 24% water content also means the lens dehydrates less than high-water-content alternatives in low-humidity environments, maintaining a more consistent fit and  over the wearing cycle. The clinical significance of Dk/t 175 is its support of corneal physiology during continuous wear periods when the eye cannot access atmospheric oxygen through blinking. During normal blinking wakefulness, the cornea receives approximately 21% atmospheric oxygen. During sleep, the cornea is dependent entirely on the oxygen that can diffuse through the closed eyelid and contact lens — Dk/t 175 is engineered to support this requirement. It is important to note that continuous wear approval does not mean continuous wear is appropriate for all wearers — your eye care professional must evaluate individual suitability, tear film quality, and corneal health before approving any extended wear schedule. With regular professional monitoring, however, Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA provides the oxygen performance that clinicians require for responsible extended wear prescribing. 🫁 Dk/t 175 — the highest oxygen transmissibility of any monthly contact lens. FDA- for up to 30 nights continuous wear when prescribed. The material of choice for eye care professionals who need the maximum oxygen performance for  extended wear patients. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Lotrafilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 24% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm and 8.6 mm Diameter 13.8 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 175 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 30 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technologies Lotrafilcon A — Dk/t 175 The highest oxygen transmissibility silicone hydrogel material available in a monthly lens. Low water content (24%) means oxygen transport relies primarily on silicone permeability — providing Dk/t 175 while minimising dehydration in challenging wearing environments. Designed specifically for  continuous wear applications. SMARTSHIELD® Technology Plasma surface  that protects the lens surface against lipid and protein deposit accumulation — critical for continuous wear applications where deposits cannot be removed until the full wearing cycle ends. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Continuous wear suitability must be determined by your eye care professional on an individual basis. Never sleep in contact lenses without an  professional recommendation and ongoing regular monitoring. Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA is available to prescribe for continuous wear — it does not replace professional assessment of individual suitability. Who Is It For? 🌙 Continuous Wear Patients The only monthly lens with Dk/t 175 — the oxygen performance that eye care professionals need for responsible continuous wear prescribing.  for up to 30 nights with professional monitoring. 🏥Therapeutic Applications Eye care professionals sometimes prescribe extended wear lenses therapeutically for certain corneal conditions. Dk/t 175 makes Night & Day® AQUA the lens of choice for these applications. ✈️Travellers & Shift Workers For professionally  wearers, the 30-night continuous wear option provides flexibility for international travel, shift work, and irregular sleep schedules. 💧Dehydration-Resistant Wearers 24% water content minimises lens dehydration in low-humidity environments — air travel, air conditioning, and dry climates — maintaining consistent fit and  throughout the wearing cycle. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. air optix night and day aqua 6 packalcon continuous wear monthlydk/t 175 contact lens30 night extended wear lenslotrafilcon a lenssmartshield technologycontactlens365air optix night and day specs This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Alcon, Air Optix, Night & Day, and SMARTSHIELD are trademarks of Alcon Inc. or its affiliates. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

.suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · Air Optix Night & Day AQUA contactlens365.com Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack Alcon's continuous wear monthly lens — Dk/t 175, the highest oxygen transmissibility in a monthly contact lens, FDA- for up to 30 nights of continuous wear. ✦ Continuous Wear / Monthly6 Lenses / BoxDk/t 175 Highest O₂30 Night ApprovalSMARTSHIELD® ContinuousWear Option 6Lenses / Box 175Dk/t O₂ 24%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack is the world's highest-oxygen-transmissibility monthly contact lens — available at contactlens365.com. With Dk/t 175 (the highest of any  monthly lens), FDA approval for up to 30 nights of continuous wear, and SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance, Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA is the lens of choice for wearers who require, or whose eye care professional has , genuine extended or continuous wear. It represents the pinnacle of silicone hydrogel oxygen performance for scheduled lens replacement formats. The extraordinary Dk/t 175 of Lotrafilcon A — the material behind Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA — is achieved through an architecture that places oxygen supply as the primary design priority. With only 24% water content (among the lowest in the category), Lotrafilcon A relies almost entirely on silicone-phase oxygen transport rather than water-phase diffusion — silicone has inherently higher oxygen permeability than water, so the reduced water content actually enables the high Dk/t performance. The 24% water content also means the lens dehydrates less than high-water-content alternatives in low-humidity environments, maintaining a more consistent fit and  over the wearing cycle. The clinical significance of Dk/t 175 is its support of corneal physiology during continuous wear periods when the eye cannot access atmospheric oxygen through blinking. During normal blinking wakefulness, the cornea receives approximately 21% atmospheric oxygen. During sleep, the cornea is dependent entirely on the oxygen that can diffuse through the closed eyelid and contact lens — Dk/t 175 is engineered to support this requirement. It is important to note that continuous wear approval does not mean continuous wear is appropriate for all wearers — your eye care professional must evaluate individual suitability, tear film quality, and corneal health before approving any extended wear schedule. With regular professional monitoring, however, Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA provides the oxygen performance that clinicians require for responsible extended wear prescribing. 🫁 Dk/t 175 — the highest oxygen transmissibility of any monthly contact lens. FDA- for up to 30 nights continuous wear when prescribed. The material of choice for eye care professionals who need the maximum oxygen performance for  extended wear patients. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Lotrafilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 24% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm and 8.6 mm Diameter 13.8 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 175 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 30 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technologies Lotrafilcon A — Dk/t 175 The highest oxygen transmissibility silicone hydrogel material available in a monthly lens. Low water content (24%) means oxygen transport relies primarily on silicone permeability — providing Dk/t 175 while minimising dehydration in challenging wearing environments. Designed specifically for  continuous wear applications. SMARTSHIELD® Technology Plasma surface  that protects the lens surface against lipid and protein deposit accumulation — critical for continuous wear applications where deposits cannot be removed until the full wearing cycle ends. ⚠️ IMPORTANT: Continuous wear suitability must be determined by your eye care professional on an individual basis. Never sleep in contact lenses without an  professional recommendation and ongoing regular monitoring. Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA is available to prescribe for continuous wear — it does not replace professional assessment of individual suitability. Who Is It For? 🌙  Continuous Wear Patients The only monthly lens with Dk/t 175 — the oxygen performance that eye care professionals need for responsible continuous wear prescribing.  for up to 30 nights with professional monitoring. 🏥 Therapeutic Applications Eye care professionals sometimes prescribe extended wear lenses therapeutically for certain corneal conditions. Dk/t 175 makes Night & Day® AQUA the lens of choice for these applications. ✈️ Travellers & Shift Workers For professionally  wearers, the 30-night continuous wear option provides flexibility for international travel, shift work, and irregular sleep schedules. 💧 Dehydration-Resistant Wearers 24% water content minimises lens dehydration in low-humidity environments — air travel, air conditioning, and dry climates — maintaining consistent fit and  throughout the wearing cycle. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Air Optix® Night & Day® AQUA 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#005b8e;--pale:#e3f0f8;--border:#90c4e0;--bg:#f0f7fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,91,142,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} Disposable6 Lenses / BoxHydraGlyde® Moisture MatrixSMARTSHIELD®Dk/t 138 MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 138Dk/t O₂ 33%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® 6 Pack is Alcon's flagship monthly silicone hydrogel lens — available at contactlens365.com. The Air Optix Plus HydraGlyde represents the most advanced version of the Air Optix monthly platform, combining the proven Lotrafilcon B silicone hydrogel substrate (Dk/t 138) with HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix for sustained surface lubrication and SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance — creating a monthly lens designed to perform at a high level from day 1 to day 30. HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix is the defining upgrade in this generation of the Air Optix platform. Earlier Air Optix lenses relied primarily on SMARTSHIELD® plasma surface  for deposit resistance but did not incorporate an integrated moisture agent. HydraGlyde® adds an amphiphilic molecule — which is simultaneously water-attracting and oil-attracting — directly into the Lotrafilcon B material during the manufacturing process. This amphiphilic character means HydraGlyde® molecules effectively bridge the material-tear film interface: the hydrophilic end integrates with the aqueous tear film while the lipophilic component bonds to the silicone hydrogel polymer. The result is a surface that remains durably wettable throughout the full monthly replacement cycle — not just during the first days of lens wear when external moisture agents are still abundant. SMARTSHIELD® Technology uses a plasma surface  applied to the outer lens surface, creating a smooth, ultra-thin protective layer that reduces the area and energy available for lipid and protein molecules from the tear film to adhere to. Monthly silicone hydrogel lenses are particularly susceptible to lipid deposit accumulation due to the hydrophobic nature of silicone — SMARTSHIELD® effectively shields the underlying silicone material from these deposits, maintaining optical surface quality and comfort-related surface properties throughout the monthly wearing cycle. The combination of HydraGlyde® and SMARTSHIELD® working together provides comprehensive monthly lens surface management — moisture and deposit resistance addressed simultaneously. 🔬 HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix + SMARTSHIELD® Technology: a dual surface management system that maintains lubrication and resists deposits simultaneously throughout the full 30-day cycle — the most comprehensive monthly lens surface platform in the Alcon range. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Lotrafilcon B (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 33% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 138 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly (30 days) Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technologies HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix An amphiphilic molecule integrated into the Lotrafilcon B material during manufacturing. Simultaneously water-attracting and oil-attracting, it durably bridges the material-tear film interface and maintains surface wettability throughout the full 30-day replacement cycle — no degradation as the month progresses. SMARTSHIELD® Technology A plasma surface  that creates a smooth, protective outer layer on the lens surface — reducing lipid and protein deposit adhesion throughout the monthly cycle. Combined with HydraGlyde®, provides dual-mode surface protection: moisture from HydraGlyde®, deposit resistance from SMARTSHIELD®. Lotrafilcon B Alcon's proven monthly silicone hydrogel polymer with Dk/t 138 — well above safe daily wear oxygen thresholds, supporting corneal health through demanding monthly wearing schedules. The substrate for the Air Optix Plus HydraGlyde platform's comprehensive surface technology. Who Is It For? 💧Month-Long Comfort Seekers HydraGlyde® + SMARTSHIELD® work together to maintain surface moisture and optical quality from day 1 to day 30 — addressing both the moisture and deposit challenges of monthly lens wear. 🔬Deposit-Sensitive Wearers SMARTSHIELD® plasma surface  reduces lipid and protein adhesion — important for wearers whose tear chemistry is high in deposits that compromise monthly lens comfort in week 3 and 4. 💻Screen & Office Workers Dk/t 138 and sustained HydraGlyde® moisture support comfort through long screen-based wearing days throughout the full monthly cycle. 🏃Active Lifestyle Monthly Wearers High Dk/t and robust surface management make Air Optix Plus HydraGlyde a strong performer for active monthly wearers with varied demanding daily routines. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#005b8e;--pale:#e3f0f8;--border:#90c4e0;--bg:#f0f7fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,91,142,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,91,142,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · Air Optix Plus HydraGlyde contactlens365.com Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® for Astigmatism 6 Pack Alcon's monthly toric lens — Precision Balance 8|4® Design for consistent axis orientation, HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix for month-long surface comfort, and SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance. ✦ Monthly Toric6 Lenses / BoxPrecision Balance 8|4®HydraGlyde® Moisture MatrixSMARTSHIELD® MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 116Dk/t O₂ 33%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® for Astigmatism 6 Pack is Alcon's premium monthly toric contact lens — available at contactlens365.com for astigmatism wearers who require reliable monthly correction with a comprehensive surface technology platform. It combines Precision Balance 8|4® Design for consistent axis orientation, HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix for sustained monthly surface comfort, and SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance — making it one of the most technically specified monthly toric lenses available. Precision Balance 8|4® Design is Alcon's toric stabilisation approach, named for its use of superior and inferior stabilisation zones. Unlike some toric designs that use a single inferior ballast zone to maintain orientation through gravity alone, the 8|4® design (8 o'clock and 4 o'clock positions) works with the natural eyelid interaction pattern during horizontal and lateral gaze. This dual-zone approach distributes the stabilisation force more evenly around the lens, resulting in more consistent orientation across a wider range of eye movements and head positions — including the large-amplitude gaze changes of computer and reading tasks that are most challenging for single-zone toric designs. HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix addresses a specific challenge of monthly toric lenses: maintaining surface wettability throughout the 30-day replacement cycle. Monthly torics are typically thicker and have a higher mass than spherical monthly lenses — the stabilisation geometry requires material in specific zones that thin spherical lenses do not carry. This additional mass can interact with the tear film differently, making surface moisture management more critical. HydraGlyde® is incorporated into the Lotrafilcon B material during manufacturing rather than applied as a separate coating, providing sustained amphiphilic lubrication throughout the month without degradation. SMARTSHIELD® Technology resists the lipid and protein deposit accumulation that can compromise toric lens optical quality and comfort in the second half of the monthly cycle. ✦ Precision Balance 8|4® Design uses dual stabilisation zones at the 8 and 4 o'clock positions — working with natural eyelid mechanics for more consistent toric axis orientation across all gaze directions than single-zone ballast designs. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Lotrafilcon B (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 33% Base Curve (BC) 8.7 mm Diameter 14.5 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 116 UV Protection None Sphere (SPH) –10.00 to +8.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Monthly (30 days) Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technologies Precision Balance 8|4® Design Dual stabilisation zones at 8 and 4 o'clock interact with the natural eyelid pattern during blink and gaze movement to maintain consistent axis orientation — more reliable than single inferior ballast designs across all gaze directions and head positions. HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix Amphiphilic molecule integrated into the Lotrafilcon B material — providing sustained surface lubrication throughout the full 30-day replacement cycle without the degradation associated with external coatings. Particularly important for toric designs where higher lens mass can affect tear film interaction. SMARTSHIELD® Technology Plasma surface  that protects the optical surface against lipid and protein deposit accumulation — maintaining toric lens optical quality and comfort from day 1 to day 30. Understanding Your Toric  Enter Sphere (SPH), Cylinder (CYL: –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, or –2.25 D), and Axis (10°–180° in 10° steps) for each eye at contactlens365.com. Consult your eye care professional for the appropriate substitute if your values fall between available options. Who Is It For? 👁️Monthly Astigmatism Wearers Precision Balance 8|4® Design and HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix — reliable axis orientation and sustained monthly comfort for demanding astigmatism correction needs. 💻Screen & Desk Users 8|4® dual-zone design maintains toric stability during the large-amplitude gaze changes of computer and reading tasks — consistent visual acuity across all viewing distances and angles. 🔬Deposit-Sensitive Wearers SMARTSHIELD® Technology and HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix work together to resist deposit accumulation — maintaining monthly toric performance through the full 30-day cycle. 💰Value-Focused Monthly Toric Premium monthly toric specification at a competitive monthly cost — comprehensive technology platform without daily disposable pricing. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Rub with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Replace case every 1–3 months. How is a toric  different? Includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle in addition to Sphere (SPH). Enter all three values correctly when ordering. How long does one 6-pack last? ~3 months for one eye (one lens per month). Two boxes for full bilateral 3-month supply. Where can I buy Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing and fast shipping. Can I swim in Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® for Astigmatism 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. air optix plus hydraglyde astigmatism 6 packalcon air optix toric monthlyprecision balance 8 4 designhydraglyde moisture matrix toricsmartshield monthly toriccontactlens365lotrafilcon b toric specs This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Alcon, Air Optix, HydraGlyde, SMARTSHIELD, and Precision Balance are trademarks of Alcon Inc. or its affiliates. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

.suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · Air Optix Plus HydraGlyde contactlens365.com Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack Alcon's monthly multifocal for presbyopia — SMARTSHIELD® Technology, HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix, and Precision Profile® Design for clear near, intermediate, and distance vision. ✦ Monthly Multifocal6 Lenses / BoxPrecision Profile® DesignHydraGlyde® Moisture MatrixSMARTSHIELD® MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 138Dk/t O₂ 33%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack is Alcon's monthly multifocal contact lens for presbyopia — available at contactlens365.com. Built on Lotrafilcon B silicone hydrogel (Dk/t 138) with SMARTSHIELD® Technology for deposit resistance and HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix for surface lubrication, it adds the Precision Profile® Design multifocal architecture — a proprietary optical system that provides smooth transitions between distance, intermediate, and near vision zones for each individual ADD level . The Precision Profile® Design represents Alcon's answer to the clinical challenge of consistent multifocal performance across the ADD range. The design uses a centre-near geometry where the central optical zone is optimised for near and intermediate vision and the peripheral zone provides distance correction, with the transition zones between them designed to minimise optical aberrations that can reduce visual quality in bright light or low-contrast environments. Critically, the Precision Profile® Design varies its zone geometry across the three ADD levels — Low, Medium, and High — rather than applying a fixed optical layout uniformly. This -specific approach is associated with better initial adaptation, higher visual quality scores at intermediate distance, and lower halos and ghost images in real-world wearing conditions. HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix is a surface wetting agent incorporated into the Lotrafilcon B material during manufacturing. Unlike topical wetting agents applied externally, HydraGlyde® provides sustained surface lubrication throughout the full monthly replacement cycle — maintaining lens surface wettability from day 1 to day 30 without the performance decline associated with external coatings. SMARTSHIELD® Technology provides protection against lipid and protein deposits that accumulate on silicone hydrogel surfaces — keeping the optical surface cleaner for longer and reducing the deposit-related discomfort that can compromise monthly multifocal performance in the second half of the wearing month. ✦ Precision Profile® Design varies its optical geometry for each ADD level — a -adapted multifocal architecture that clinical studies show delivers better intermediate vision performance and easier adaptation than fixed-design monthly multifocals. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Lotrafilcon B (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 33% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 138 UV Protection None Sphere (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D ADD Options Low (up to +1.25 D) / Mid (+1.50–+2.00 D) / High (+2.25 D+) Replacement Schedule Monthly (30 days) Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technologies Precision Profile® Design A centre-near multifocal optical architecture with -specific zone geometries for each ADD level. Smooth distance-to-near transitions with minimised aberrations — better intermediate performance than conventional fixed-design monthly multifocals. HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix An amphiphilic (water-attracting and water-holding) molecule incorporated into the Lotrafilcon B material — providing sustained surface lubrication from day 1 to day 30 without the performance decline of external coatings. SMARTSHIELD® Technology Plasma surface  that creates a smooth, deposit-resistant lens surface — resisting lipid and protein accumulation throughout the monthly replacement cycle and maintaining optical surface quality month-long. ADD Guide ADD tiers: Low (up to +1.25 D, early presbyopia), Mid (+1.50–+2.00 D, moderate), High (+2.25 D+, advanced). Your eye care professional determines the correct tier and optimises fit. Enter SPH and ADD tier for each eye separately at contactlens365.com. Allow 1–2 weeks for neural adaptation to the multifocal design. Who Is It For? 👓Monthly Presbyopia Wearers -adapted Precision Profile® Design and HydraGlyde® Moisture Matrix in a monthly format — clear all-distance vision with month-long surface comfort. 📱Screen & Intermediate Distance Users Precision Profile® Design performs particularly well at intermediate distances — screen and arm's-length work that modern presbyopes use most throughout the day. 💧Deposit-Sensitive Wearers SMARTSHIELD® Technology resists lipid and protein deposits — important for monthly wearers who find lens clarity and comfort decline in the second half of the replacement cycle. 🌙Night Vision Quality Seekers Precision Profile® Design minimises optical aberrations that affect night vision — important for presbyopes who drive after dark. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Air Optix® Plus HydraGlyde® Multifocal 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#005b8e;--pale:#e3f0f8;--border:#90c4e0;--bg:#f0f7fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px}
