.suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · DAILIES AquaComfort Plus contactlens365.com DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack Alcon's blink-activated daily hydrogel lens in a 30-lens monthly supply — three moisture agents for consistent daily comfort in the ideal trial format. ✦ Daily Disposable30 Lenses / BoxBlink-Activated Moisture69% WaterNelfilcon A DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 26Dk/t O₂ 69%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack is Alcon's daily hydrogel contact lens with a three-component blink-activated moisture system — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box covering 1 month per eye. Built on nelfilcon A hydrogel with 69% water content and a unique triple-action moisture release approach, DAILIES AquaComfort Plus is designed to actively refresh moisture with every blink rather than relying on a static wetting agent. The result is a daily lens that many wearers describe as feeling fresher throughout the day as the blink-activated moisture system continues to work, rather than experiencing the gradual comfort decline typical of single-agent daily hydrogels. The blink-activated moisture system in DAILIES AquaComfort Plus works through three distinct moisture agents: a moisture-release agent that is gradually released from the lens material with each blink, a tear-coating agent that helps the lens surface integrate with the natural tear film, and a comfort-boost agent that provides lubrication during lens insertion and removal. This multi-agent approach creates a different comfort dynamic from single-agent systems — with multiple mechanisms contributing to the overall moisture experience simultaneously, each complementing the others at different phases of the wearing day. Nelfilcon A at 69% water content is one of the highest water-content materials in the daily hydrogel category — providing a naturally very soft, moist on-eye feel from the moment of insertion. While Dk/t 26 is at the lower end of the daily lens range, it is appropriate for recommended daily wearing schedules in healthy eyes. The lens is FDA- for planned replacement on a daily basis and is suitable for the majority of myopic and hyperopic prescriptions within the available parameter range. At contactlens365.com, all DAILIES AquaComfort Plus parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. 💧 Blink-activated moisture release — three moisture agents work with every blink to refresh the lens surface throughout the day. A fundamentally different comfort approach from static wetting agents, designed to maintain freshness from morning to evening. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Nelfilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 69% Base Curve (BC) 8.7 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 26 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technology Blink-Activated Moisture System Three moisture agents — a moisture-release agent, a tear-coating agent, and a comfort-boost agent — work together with each blink to refresh the lens surface, help it integrate with the natural tear film, and lubricate insertion and removal. Unlike static wetting agents that deplete over time, the blink-activated approach continuously refreshes moisture throughout the wearing day. Nelfilcon A A 69% water content hydrogel — one of the highest in the daily category. Extremely soft and moist on-eye feel from first insertion. PVA-based polymer with excellent biocompatibility and a long clinical safety record in daily lens applications. Who Is It For? 🔄Freshness-Through-the-Day Seekers Blink-activated moisture works throughout the day — many wearers report the lens feeling refreshed rather than gradually drying, a fundamentally different comfort experience from static-agent competitors. 💧High Water Content Preference 69% water content — one of the highest available in a daily lens. Exceptionally soft, natural on-eye feel particularly appreciated by hydrogel-preference wearers. 🌟First-Time Daily Wearers An accessible, comfortable introduction to daily lens wear with a comfort technology that performs consistently from day one. 💰Value-Conscious Wearers Competitive pricing for a daily lens with a genuinely differentiated moisture technology — strong value in the Alcon daily portfolio. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,91,142,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,91,142,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · DAILIES AquaComfort Plus contactlens365.com DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack Alcon's blink-activated daily hydrogel lens in a 90-lens 3-month supply — three moisture agents that refresh with every blink for consistent comfort from morning to evening. ✦ Daily Disposable90 Lenses / BoxBlink-Activated Moisture69% WaterNelfilcon A DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 26Dk/t O₂ 69%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack is Alcon's daily hydrogel contact lens with a three-component blink-activated moisture system — available at contactlens365.com in a 90-lens box covering 3 months per eye. Built on nelfilcon A hydrogel with 69% water content and a unique triple-action moisture release approach, DAILIES AquaComfort Plus is designed to actively refresh moisture with every blink rather than relying on a static wetting agent. The result is a daily lens that many wearers describe as feeling fresher throughout the day as the blink-activated moisture system continues to work, rather than experiencing the gradual comfort decline typical of single-agent daily hydrogels. The blink-activated moisture system in DAILIES AquaComfort Plus works through three distinct moisture agents: a moisture-release agent that is gradually released from the lens material with each blink, a tear-coating agent that helps the lens surface integrate with the natural tear film, and a comfort-boost agent that provides lubrication during lens insertion and removal. This multi-agent approach creates a different comfort dynamic from single-agent systems — with multiple mechanisms contributing to the overall moisture experience simultaneously, each complementing the others at different phases of the wearing day. Nelfilcon A at 69% water content is one of the highest water-content materials in the daily hydrogel category — providing a naturally very soft, moist on-eye feel from the moment of insertion. While Dk/t 26 is at the lower end of the daily lens range, it is appropriate for recommended daily wearing schedules in healthy eyes. The lens is FDA- for planned replacement on a daily basis and is suitable for the majority of myopic and hyperopic prescriptions within the available parameter range. At contactlens365.com, all DAILIES AquaComfort Plus parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. 💧 Blink-activated moisture release — three moisture agents work with every blink to refresh the lens surface throughout the day. A fundamentally different comfort approach from static wetting agents, designed to maintain freshness from morning to evening. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Nelfilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 69% Base Curve (BC) 8.7 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 26 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technology Blink-Activated Moisture System Three moisture agents — a moisture-release agent, a tear-coating agent, and a comfort-boost agent — work together with each blink to refresh the lens surface, help it integrate with the natural tear film, and lubricate insertion and removal. Unlike static wetting agents that deplete over time, the blink-activated approach continuously refreshes moisture throughout the wearing day. Nelfilcon A A 69% water content hydrogel — one of the highest in the daily category. Extremely soft and moist on-eye feel from first insertion. PVA-based polymer with excellent biocompatibility and a long clinical safety record in daily lens applications. Who Is It For? 🔄Freshness-Through-the-Day Seekers Blink-activated moisture works throughout the day — many wearers report the lens feeling refreshed rather than gradually drying, a fundamentally different comfort experience from static-agent competitors. 💧High Water Content Preference 69% water content — one of the highest available in a daily lens. Exceptionally soft, natural on-eye feel particularly appreciated by hydrogel-preference wearers. 🌟First-Time Daily Wearers An accessible, comfortable introduction to daily lens wear with a comfort technology that performs consistently from day one. 💰Value-Conscious Wearers Competitive pricing for a daily lens with a genuinely differentiated moisture technology — strong value in the Alcon daily portfolio. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is DAILIES® AquaComfort Plus® 90 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. dailies aquacomfort plus 90 packalcon dailies aquacomfort 90blink activated moisture systemnelfilcon a lensdaily hydrogel 90 packcontactlens365dailies aquacomfort specs This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Alcon, DAILIES, and AquaComfort Plus are trademarks of Alcon Inc. or its affiliates. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

.suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · DAILIES TOTAL1 contactlens365.com DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack Alcon's water gradient daily lens in a 30-lens monthly supply — the ultimate in daily lens comfort technology in the ideal trial and monthly order format. ✦ Daily Disposable30 Lenses / BoxWater GradientDk/t 156Class 1 UV DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 156Dk/t O₂ ~80%Surface H₂O ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack is Alcon's flagship water gradient daily contact lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box covering 1 month per eye. DAILIES TOTAL1® pioneered the water gradient concept in contact lenses: a delefilcon A silicone hydrogel core (33% bulk water content) transitions to a surface layer that reaches approximately 80% water at the outermost microns — creating a lens that has silicone hydrogel oxygen performance at its core and a near-100% water composition at its tear film interface. The result is a lens surface described by wearers as feeling like "almost nothing" — barely perceptible on-eye, with exceptional end-of-day comfort that clinical studies consistently rank above competing daily silicone hydrogels. The water gradient architecture is not simply a coating over a silicone core — it is a continuous gradient built into the polymer structure itself. From the delefilcon A core (Dk/t 156), water content increases continuously toward the lens surface, reaching approximately 80% at the outermost layer. This gradient eliminates the sharp material boundary between silicone hydrogel core and surface coating that characterises most other SiHy daily lens designs — a boundary that can create differential dehydration rates and surface discontinuity as the wearing day progresses. In DAILIES TOTAL1®, the gradient surface and the bulk material dehydrate at compatible rates, maintaining the integrity and feel of the surface throughout the full wearing day. With Dk/t 156, DAILIES TOTAL1® has one of the highest oxygen transmissibility values in the daily lens category — well above the thresholds for safe daily and extended wear, supporting corneal health throughout the most demanding wearing days. Class 1 UV protection blocks 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB. At contactlens365.com, all available parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. 🌊 The water gradient is built into the polymer structure — not a surface coating. From 33% at the silicone core to ~80% at the surface, it is a continuous material transition. Near-frictionless surface feel that clinical studies rank above all competing daily lens technologies. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Delefilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Bulk Water Content 33% Surface Water Content ~80% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.1 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 156 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technology Water Gradient Technology A continuous gradient built into the delefilcon A polymer structure — transitioning from 33% water at the SiHy core to approximately 80% at the lens surface. No separate coating, no material boundary — the gradient is the material itself. Creates a near-frictionless surface that interacts with the tear film as if it were a soft, wet interface rather than a polymer surface. Delefilcon A Alcon's proprietary water gradient polymer with Dk/t 156 — one of the highest oxygen transmissibility values in the daily lens category. Supports corneal health throughout the most demanding daily wearing schedules and provides the SiHy oxygen performance foundation on which the water gradient surface creates its unique sensory experience. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — maximum available UV protection in a daily lens, built into every lens every day. Who Is It For? ✨Near-Invisible Comfort Seekers The water gradient surface creates a near-frictionless, barely perceptible on-eye experience — the lens most often described as "feeling like nothing" in clinical wearer evaluations. 💧End-of-Day Comfort Priority Clinical studies consistently rank DAILIES TOTAL1® above competing daily lenses on end-of-day comfort — the metric where the water gradient architecture delivers its most significant advantage. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — with every daily lens. No extra steps or accessories required. 🏃Active Lifestyles The water gradient surface is stable during physical activity — no solution, no case, just open and wear. The most premium daily lens in a fully disposable format. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is DAILIES TOTAL1® 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,91,142,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,91,142,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,91,142,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,91,142,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,91,142,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · PRECISION1 contactlens365.com PRECISION1® Daily 30 Pack Alcon's SMARTSURFACE® daily lens — 80% water content surface on a Dk/t 100 SiHy core — in a 30-lens monthly supply for trials and flexible ordering. ✦ Daily Disposable30 Lenses / BoxSMARTSURFACE®Dk/t 10080% Water Surface DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 100Dk/t O₂ 80%Surface H₂O ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon PRECISION1® 30 Pack is Alcon's breakthrough daily silicone hydrogel lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box covering 1 month per eye. Built on Verofilcon A with SMARTSURFACE® Technology, PRECISION1® achieves a remarkable result: a silicone hydrogel core with high oxygen transmissibility (Dk/t 100) encased in a moisture-rich surface layer that is 80% water at the outermost microns of the lens. This hydrogel-like surface on a SiHy core is what makes PRECISION1® unique — the oxygen performance of silicone hydrogel combined with the surface softness and moisture feel of a high-water-content hydrogel. SMARTSURFACE® Technology is the engineering innovation that enables this performance. The lens is manufactured with a Verofilcon A silicone hydrogel core that provides the structural integrity and oxygen transmissibility, but the outermost layer — a nanoscale coating applied during manufacturing — is 80% water content. This ultra-thin, permanently bonded water-rich surface changes the lens-tear film interaction fundamentally: instead of the silicone hydrogel core interacting directly with the lid and tear film (as in conventional SiHy lenses), the 80% water surface does. The result is a lens that blinks like a hydrogel, feels like a hydrogel, but breathes like a silicone hydrogel. Clinically, PRECISION1® performs exceptionally well on end-of-day comfort measures — the metric where conventional SiHy dailies most often disappoint. The 80% water surface maintains its integrity throughout the wearing day, resisting dehydration in challenging environments and sustaining comfort from morning to evening without the performance decline associated with coated alternatives where the coating can degrade over time. 🔬 SMARTSURFACE® Technology creates an 80% water content surface layer on a Dk/t 100 silicone hydrogel core — the best of both worlds: SiHy oxygen performance with hydrogel surface softness and moisture feel. A genuine technological breakthrough in daily lens design. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Verofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Surface Technology SMARTSURFACE® (80% water at surface) Bulk Water Content 51% Base Curve (BC) 8.3 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 100 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technology SMARTSURFACE® Technology A nanoscale 80% water content surface layer permanently bonded to the Verofilcon A SiHy core during manufacturing. The ultra-thin water-rich surface interacts with the lid and tear film instead of the silicone core — delivering hydrogel-like surface comfort while the SiHy core provides Dk/t 100 oxygen supply. Unlike traditional surface coatings, SMARTSURFACE® is bonded permanently and does not degrade over the wearing day. Verofilcon A Alcon's proprietary silicone hydrogel polymer developed specifically for PRECISION1®. With 51% bulk water content and Dk/t 100, it provides the oxygen performance foundation on which SMARTSURFACE® Technology creates its uniquely comfortable exterior. Who Is It For? 💧End-of-Day Comfort Seekers SMARTSURFACE® 80% water surface consistently outperforms conventional SiHy dailies on end-of-day comfort — the metric where most daily wearers experience the biggest difference. 🔬Technology-Led Lens Choosers SMARTSURFACE® is genuinely different from coating-based approaches — the 80% water surface is permanently bonded, not applied, and does not degrade over the wearing day. 💻Screen Workers The water-rich surface maintains moisture integrity during long screen sessions where blink rate drops — without rewetting drops or mid-day discomfort. 🏃Active Lifestyles Daily disposable convenience — open, wear, discard. SMARTSURFACE® moisture stability performs well during sport and physical activity. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for PRECISION1® 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy PRECISION1® 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing PRECISION1® 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in PRECISION1® 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is PRECISION1® 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. precision1 30 packalcon precision1 daily 30smartsurface technologyverofilcon a 30 packcontactlens365alcon daily lens 30 pack This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Alcon and PRECISION1 are trademarks of Alcon Inc. or its affiliates. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

.suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Alcon · PRECISION1 contactlens365.com PRECISION1® Daily 90 Pack Alcon's breakthrough SMARTSURFACE® daily lens — 80% water content at the surface on a Dk/t 100 SiHy core — in a 90-lens 3-month supply box. ✦ Daily Disposable90 Lenses / BoxSMARTSURFACE®Dk/t 10080% Water Surface DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 100Dk/t O₂ 80%Surface H₂O ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Alcon PRECISION1® 90 Pack is Alcon's breakthrough daily silicone hydrogel lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 90-lens box covering 3 months per eye. Built on Verofilcon A with SMARTSURFACE® Technology, PRECISION1® achieves a remarkable result: a silicone hydrogel core with high oxygen transmissibility (Dk/t 100) encased in a moisture-rich surface layer that is 80% water at the outermost microns of the lens. This hydrogel-like surface on a SiHy core is what makes PRECISION1® unique — the oxygen performance of silicone hydrogel combined with the surface softness and moisture feel of a high-water-content hydrogel. SMARTSURFACE® Technology is the engineering innovation that enables this performance. The lens is manufactured with a Verofilcon A silicone hydrogel core that provides the structural integrity and oxygen transmissibility, but the outermost layer — a nanoscale coating applied during manufacturing — is 80% water content. This ultra-thin, permanently bonded water-rich surface changes the lens-tear film interaction fundamentally: instead of the silicone hydrogel core interacting directly with the lid and tear film (as in conventional SiHy lenses), the 80% water surface does. The result is a lens that blinks like a hydrogel, feels like a hydrogel, but breathes like a silicone hydrogel. Clinically, PRECISION1® performs exceptionally well on end-of-day comfort measures — the metric where conventional SiHy dailies most often disappoint. The 80% water surface maintains its integrity throughout the wearing day, resisting dehydration in challenging environments and sustaining comfort from morning to evening without the performance decline associated with coated alternatives where the coating can degrade over time. 🔬 SMARTSURFACE® Technology creates an 80% water content surface layer on a Dk/t 100 silicone hydrogel core — the best of both worlds: SiHy oxygen performance with hydrogel surface softness and moisture feel. A genuine technological breakthrough in daily lens design. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Verofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Surface Technology SMARTSURFACE® (80% water at surface) Bulk Water Content 51% Base Curve (BC) 8.3 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 100 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Alcon Key Technology SMARTSURFACE® Technology A nanoscale 80% water content surface layer permanently bonded to the Verofilcon A SiHy core during manufacturing. The ultra-thin water-rich surface interacts with the lid and tear film instead of the silicone core — delivering hydrogel-like surface comfort while the SiHy core provides Dk/t 100 oxygen supply. Unlike traditional surface coatings, SMARTSURFACE® is bonded permanently and does not degrade over the wearing day. Verofilcon A Alcon's proprietary silicone hydrogel polymer developed specifically for PRECISION1®. With 51% bulk water content and Dk/t 100, it provides the oxygen performance foundation on which SMARTSURFACE® Technology creates its uniquely comfortable exterior. Who Is It For? 💧End-of-Day Comfort Seekers SMARTSURFACE® 80% water surface consistently outperforms conventional SiHy dailies on end-of-day comfort — the metric where most daily wearers experience the biggest difference. 🔬Technology-Led Lens Choosers SMARTSURFACE® is genuinely different from coating-based approaches — the 80% water surface is permanently bonded, not applied, and does not degrade over the wearing day. 💻Screen Workers The water-rich surface maintains moisture integrity during long screen sessions where blink rate drops — without rewetting drops or mid-day discomfort. 🏃Active Lifestyles Daily disposable convenience — open, wear, discard. SMARTSURFACE® moisture stability performs well during sport and physical activity. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for PRECISION1® 90 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy PRECISION1® 90 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing PRECISION1® 90 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in PRECISION1® 90 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is PRECISION1® 90 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 30 Pack J&J's daily toric lens in a 30-lens monthly supply — BLINK STABILIZED® Design and LACREON® Technology for consistent daily astigmatism correction and comfort. ✦ Daily Toric30 Lenses / BoxBLINK STABILIZED®LACREON® TechnologyClass 2 UV DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 26Dk/t O₂ 58%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 30 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's daily toric contact lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box covering 1 month per eye. Combining LACREON® Technology for daily moisture support with BLINK STABILIZED® Design for reliable axis orientation, it delivers consistent astigmatism correction in a convenient daily disposable format — no cleaning, no cases, no lens care solution required. Astigmatism correction in a daily lens has historically been challenging due to the thinner, lighter material profile of daily lenses compared to monthlies — which can make toric stabilisation less predictable. BLINK STABILIZED® Design addresses this directly: four stabilisation zones positioned around the lens periphery interact with the natural eyelid blink action to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis position after every blink and eye movement. Clinical studies of BLINK STABILIZED® Design in the 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism show orientation stability comparable to much thicker monthly toric designs — a significant engineering achievement in a daily disposable format. LACREON® Technology embeds a moisture-retaining agent throughout the etafilcon A hydrogel material — locked into the polymer matrix rather than applied as a surface coating. This means comfort levels remain consistent from insertion to removal regardless of blinking, rubbing, or environmental conditions, making 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism a reliable performer for toric wearers with demanding daily routines. With a power range of SPH –9.00 to +4.00 D, CYL –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D, and Axis 10°–180° in 10° steps, it covers the majority of astigmatic prescriptions. At contactlens365.com, all available parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. ✦ BLINK STABILIZED® Design uses the natural blink action to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis — proven orientation stability in a daily disposable toric, combined with LACREON® Technology moisture support. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Etafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 58% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.5 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 26 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies BLINK STABILIZED® Four stabilisation zones interact with the natural eyelid blink to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis — reliable cylindrical correction throughout the day, proven to work in the challenging thinner-material profile of daily toric lenses. LACREON® Technology Moisture-retaining agent embedded throughout the etafilcon A matrix — not a surface coating. Consistent comfort from insertion to removal, unaffected by blinking, rubbing, or environmental conditions. Understanding Your Toric  Your toric  includes SPH (sphere power), CYL (–0.75, –1.25, –1.75, or –2.25 D), and Axis (10°–180° in 10° steps). Enter right eye (OD) and left eye (OS) values separately at contactlens365.com. Consult your eye care professional if any value falls between available options. Who Is It For? 👁️Daily Astigmatism Wearers BLINK STABILIZED® Design delivers reliable axis stability in a daily format — fresh lens every day with consistent toric correction throughout. ✈️Travellers No solution, no case — just open and wear. Daily disposable toric lenses are the most travel-friendly astigmatism correction option available. 💰Value-Conscious Toric Wearers More affordable than premium SiHy daily torics while maintaining excellent BLINK STABILIZED® orientation performance and LACREON® comfort. 🏃Active Lifestyles Fresh daily toric lens — no cleaning, no deposit concerns. BLINK STABILIZED® Design maintains axis orientation during sport and physical activity. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need solution for 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 30 Pack? No — daily disposable. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard at end of day. How is a toric  different? A toric  includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle, in addition to the standard Sphere (SPH). All three values must match available parameters exactly. What if my CYL or axis is not available? Consult your eye care professional for the closest appropriate substitute. Never self-substitute toric parameters. Where can I buy 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 30 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim in 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 30 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 90 Pack J&J's daily toric lens in a 90-lens 3-month supply — BLINK STABILIZED® Design and LACREON® Technology for reliable astigmatism correction with daily comfort. ✦ Daily Toric90 Lenses / BoxBLINK STABILIZED®LACREON® TechnologyClass 2 UV DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 26Dk/t O₂ 58%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 90 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's daily toric contact lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 90-lens box covering 3 months per eye. Combining LACREON® Technology for daily moisture support with BLINK STABILIZED® Design for reliable axis orientation, it delivers consistent astigmatism correction in a convenient daily disposable format — no cleaning, no cases, no lens care solution required. Astigmatism correction in a daily lens has historically been challenging due to the thinner, lighter material profile of daily lenses compared to monthlies — which can make toric stabilisation less predictable. BLINK STABILIZED® Design addresses this directly: four stabilisation zones positioned around the lens periphery interact with the natural eyelid blink action to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis position after every blink and eye movement. Clinical studies of BLINK STABILIZED® Design in the 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism show orientation stability comparable to much thicker monthly toric designs — a significant engineering achievement in a daily disposable format. LACREON® Technology embeds a moisture-retaining agent throughout the etafilcon A hydrogel material — locked into the polymer matrix rather than applied as a surface coating. This means comfort levels remain consistent from insertion to removal regardless of blinking, rubbing, or environmental conditions, making 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism a reliable performer for toric wearers with demanding daily routines. With a power range of SPH –9.00 to +4.00 D, CYL –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D, and Axis 10°–180° in 10° steps, it covers the majority of astigmatic prescriptions. At contactlens365.com, all available parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. ✦ BLINK STABILIZED® Design uses the natural blink action to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis — proven orientation stability in a daily disposable toric, combined with LACREON® Technology moisture support. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Etafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 58% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.5 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 26 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies BLINK STABILIZED® Four stabilisation zones interact with the natural eyelid blink to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis — reliable cylindrical correction throughout the day, proven to work in the challenging thinner-material profile of daily toric lenses. LACREON® Technology Moisture-retaining agent embedded throughout the etafilcon A matrix — not a surface coating. Consistent comfort from insertion to removal, unaffected by blinking, rubbing, or environmental conditions. Understanding Your Toric  Your toric  includes SPH (sphere power), CYL (–0.75, –1.25, –1.75, or –2.25 D), and Axis (10°–180° in 10° steps). Enter right eye (OD) and left eye (OS) values separately at contactlens365.com. Consult your eye care professional if any value falls between available options. Who Is It For? 👁️Daily Astigmatism Wearers BLINK STABILIZED® Design delivers reliable axis stability in a daily format — fresh lens every day with consistent toric correction throughout. ✈️Travellers No solution, no case — just open and wear. Daily disposable toric lenses are the most travel-friendly astigmatism correction option available. 💰Value-Conscious Toric Wearers More affordable than premium SiHy daily torics while maintaining excellent BLINK STABILIZED® orientation performance and LACREON® comfort. 🏃Active Lifestyles Fresh daily toric lens — no cleaning, no deposit concerns. BLINK STABILIZED® Design maintains axis orientation during sport and physical activity. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need solution for 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 90 Pack? No — daily disposable. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard at end of day. How is a toric  different? A toric  includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle, in addition to the standard Sphere (SPH). All three values must match available parameters exactly. What if my CYL or axis is not available? Consult your eye care professional for the closest appropriate substitute. Never self-substitute toric parameters. Where can I buy 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 90 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim in 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist for Astigmatism 90 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. 1 day acuvue moist astigmatism 90 packdaily toric 90 pack acuvue moistblink stabilized daily toriclacreon toric lenscontactlens365etafilcon a toric daily 90 This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack J&J's daily multifocal for presbyopia in a 30-lens monthly supply — PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ and LACREON® Technology for all-distance daily vision correction. ✦ Daily Multifocal30 Lenses / BoxPUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™LACREON® TechnologyBC 8.5 mm DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 33.3Dk/t O₂ 58%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's daily multifocal contact lens for presbyopia correction — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box covering 1 month per eye. Combining LACREON® Technology for sustained daily moisture with the PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ multifocal optical architecture, it provides clear vision at distance, intermediate, and near ranges in a fresh daily disposable format that eliminates cleaning, storage, and lens care — making it the most convenient multifocal lens format available. PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ is the technology that makes 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal clinically effective beyond what conventional fixed-zone multifocal designs can achieve. Rather than applying a single optical zone layout across all prescriptions, the design varies the geometry of the central near zone and peripheral distance zone based on the individual wearer's Sphere power and ADD value. This -specific optimisation means that wearers across the ADD range receive a design tailored to their specific correction requirements — with clinical studies showing particular benefit for intermediate (screen and arm's-length) vision, which is the distance most presbyopes report needing most in daily modern life. The lens is built on etafilcon A hydrogel with LACREON® Technology — an embedded wetting agent that cannot be washed away by blinking or tear film interaction, providing consistent moisture throughout the full wearing day. Available in Low, Mid, and High ADD options with a Sphere range of –9.00 to +6.00 D. At contactlens365.com all parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. Multifocal lenses require a fitting from your eye care professional who will determine the correct ADD tier and optimise the lens for your individual . ✦ PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ adapts the multifocal optical geometry to each individual  — delivering better intermediate vision performance than conventional fixed-zone daily multifocals, in a fresh daily disposable with LACREON® moisture support. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Etafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 58% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.3 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 33.3 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +6.00 D ADD Options Low (+0.75–+1.25 D) / Mid (+1.50–+1.75 D) / High (+2.00–+2.50 D) Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ Multifocal optical zones are varied based on the individual wearer's SPH and ADD combination — not fixed uniformly across the range. Delivers better intermediate and near performance than conventional concentric-zone daily multifocals, with more natural neural adaptation for most wearers. LACREON® Technology A moisture-retaining agent embedded into the etafilcon A material — locked into the lens matrix so it cannot be removed by blinking or tear film interaction. Provides consistent daily comfort from first wear to removal, throughout the entire wearing day. ADD Guide ADD values: Low (+0.75–+1.25 D, early presbyopia), Mid (+1.50–+1.75 D, moderate), High (+2.00–+2.50 D, advanced). Determined by your eye care professional. Enter SPH and ADD tier separately for right (OD) and left (OS) eye when ordering at contactlens365.com. Allow 1–2 weeks for neural adaptation to the multifocal design. Who Is It For? 👓Presbyopia Wearers Clear distance, intermediate, and near vision in a daily format — no cleaning, no storage, fresh lens each day for the most hygienic multifocal option available. 📱Reading Glass Avoiders PUPIL OPTIMIZED DESIGN™ delivers particularly good intermediate (screen/tablet) performance — covering the distance presbyopes use most in modern daily life. ✈️Travellers Daily disposables require no solution or case. Travel without lens care accessories — open, wear, and discard at the end of each day. 💧Moisture-Focused Wearers LACREON® Technology provides consistent daily moisture regardless of environment — air conditioning, screens, and extended wearing hours. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist Multifocal 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied?
