*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#0066cc;--pale:#eef5fb;--border:#c5daea;--bg:#f5f9fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,102,204,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,102,204,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack J&J's original daily hydrogel lens with LACREON® Technology — an embedded wetting agent that stays with the lens all day for consistent moisture and comfort in an accessible daily format. ✦ Daily Disposable30 Lenses / BoxLACREON® TechnologyEtafilcon AClass 2 UV DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 28Dk/t O₂ 58%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's established daily hydrogel contact lens — available at contactlens365.com as an accessible, comfortable daily disposable with the company's proven LACREON® Technology moisture system. While the OASYS 1-Day and ACUVUE® OASYS MAX 1-Day represent the premium end of the J&J daily range, the 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist occupies an important position as a highly comfortable, cost-effective entry point into daily contact lens wear — with a comfort technology that has been refined over many years of clinical use. LACREON® Technology is the distinguishing feature of 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist. It works by embedding a moisture-retaining agent directly into the etafilcon A hydrogel material — locking the wetting agent into the lens matrix so that it cannot be removed by blinking, rubbing, or tear film interaction. This is a meaningfully different approach from lens surface coatings that can be degraded over the wearing day. Clinical evaluations consistently rate 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist as comfortable throughout the full wearing day, with many users reporting comfort levels that exceed expectations for a non-silicone hydrogel daily lens. At 58% water content, etafilcon A provides a soft, naturally moist feel on-eye. Dk/t of 28 is appropriate for recommended daily wearing hours with healthy eyes — your eye care professional will advise on suitability for extended wearing schedules. The power range of –12.00 to +8.00 D covers a wide spectrum of myopic and hyperopic prescriptions. Class 2 UV protection offers meaningful daily solar defence. At contactlens365.com, all available 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. 💧 LACREON® Technology embeds a moisture-retaining agent directly into the etafilcon A material — it stays with the lens all day, not just on the surface. Consistent comfort from first wear to end of day. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Etafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 58% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm and 9.0 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 28 UV Protection Class 2 — UVA 70%+, UVB 95%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technology LACREON® Technology A moisture-retaining agent embedded directly into the etafilcon A hydrogel material — not applied as a surface coating. Because it is locked into the lens matrix, it cannot be removed by blinking, rubbing, or tear film interaction, providing consistent moisture throughout the entire wearing day. Etafilcon A A high-water-content (58%) hydrogel that provides a soft, naturally moist on-eye feel. Non-ionic polymer reduces protein deposit attraction compared to ionic hydrogels. Well-established material with extensive clinical safety data accumulated over decades of use. Who Is It For? 🌟First-Time Daily Lens Wearers An accessible, comfortable introduction to daily contact lens wear — LACREON® Technology ensures consistent comfort that builds wearer confidence from day one. 💰Value-Conscious Daily Wearers More affordable than silicone hydrogel daily alternatives while maintaining excellent comfort — ideal for part-time wearers or those with a limited lens budget. ✈️Occasional & Social Wearers Worn a few days a week or for social occasions? Daily disposables eliminate the hygiene concerns of storing partially-used lenses between wearing sessions. 🏃Active Lifestyles Fresh every day — no deposit build-up, no cleaning routine. Open, wear, and discard after each use. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is 1-Day ACUVUE® Moist 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. 1 day acuvue moist 30 packacuvue moist daily 30lacreon technology lensetafilcon a daily lenscontactlens365acuvue moist specsdaily hydrogel lens 30 packaffordable daily lens This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Johnson & Johnson Vision, ACUVUE, and LACREON are trademarks of Johnson & Johnson Vision Care, Inc. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

Type 30Lenses / Box 121Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's premium daily silicone hydrogel lens — available at contactlens365.com in a 30-lens box providing a 1 month supply per eye. Built on Senofilcon A with HydraLuxe® Technology, the OASYS 1-Day represents the daily evolution of the iconic OASYS platform — bringing its legendary comfort  to a fresh-every-day format that eliminates the need for cleaning, storage, and lens care solution. HydraLuxe® Technology is the moisture innovation that distinguishes ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day from conventional daily silicone hydrogels. Rather than relying on a surface coating or wetting agent that depletes over the wearing day, HydraLuxe® incorporates a network of tear-like molecules throughout the lens material. These molecules integrate with the natural tear film — reinforcing the mucin-like layer that stabilises the tear film and the aqueous layer that lubricates the corneal surface. The practical result is a daily lens that maintains moisture and visual clarity from morning insertion to evening removal without the mid-day comfort decline that many daily silicone hydrogel wearers experience. Class 1 UV protection — blocking 96% UVA and over 99% UVB — is built into every lens, providing daily solar defence without any additional accessories or steps. The power range of –12.00 to +8.00 D with two base curve options (8.5 mm and 9.0 mm) accommodates a broad range of prescriptions and corneal geometries. At contactlens365.com, all available parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. ✦ HydraLuxe® Technology integrates tear-like molecules that reinforce the natural tear film — not just add surface hydration. The result is moisture that lasts all day, every day, in a fresh daily lens. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm and 9.0 mm Diameter 14.3 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 121 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies HydraLuxe® Technology A network of tear-like molecules integrated throughout the Senofilcon A material — reinforcing the natural tear film's mucin-like and aqueous layers rather than simply adding surface hydration. Moisture levels remain consistent from first wear to end-of-day removal without coatings or wetting agents that deplete over time. Senofilcon A Johnson & Johnson Vision's proven silicone hydrogel with Dk/t 121 — well above the safe daily wear threshold, supporting corneal health throughout extended wearing days. The same material that underpins the OASYS monthly platform, adapted for daily format. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — maximum available UV protection in a daily lens. Built into every lens, every day, without extra steps. Who Is It For? 💧All-Day Comfort Seekers HydraLuxe® Technology's tear film integration approach delivers sustained comfort that outperforms surface-coated competitors — particularly during long screen-intensive wearing days. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection in a daily lens — maximum available solar defence, automatically, with every fresh lens opened. ✈️Travellers No solution, no case, no cleaning. The daily format is the most travel-friendly contact lens option available. 🏃Active Lifestyles Fresh lens every day — hygienic, convenient, and no deposit build-up concerns regardless of what the day involves. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day 30 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . } .hero-stats { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .suited-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .why-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com Acuvue Oasys1-Day 90 Pack Daily silicone hydrogel lenses engineered with HydraLuxe™ technology for all-day comfort — 90 lenses per box. ✦ Daily Disposable 90 Lenses / Box HydraLuxe™ Technology UV Class 1 Protection BC 8.5 & 9.0 mm · Dia 14.3 mm Daily Wear Type 90 Lenses / Box 121 Dk/t O₂ Transmit. 38% Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack is one of the most popular daily contact lenses at contactlens365.com. Manufactured with a modern, eye-health-first formulation, it combines high oxygen permeability, superior moisture retention, and outstanding comfort performance — redefining what a daily lens experience can feel like. Order your Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack at contactlens365.com with  authenticity,  expiry dates, and secure payment options. Developed by a globally trusted manufacturer through rigorous quality control and clinical studies, the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack is optimised for a wide range of lifestyles and eye anatomies. From the moment you put them in to the moment you take them out, users consistently rate comfort as the standout feature in satisfaction surveys. At contactlens365.com, we always stock the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack fresh from authorised distributors at competitive prices. 💡 Long screen hours, outdoor activity, or a demanding work schedule can all compromise lens comfort. The Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack is engineered to resist these challenges — keeping your eyes moist and lenses perfectly seated all day long. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm and 9.0 mm Diameter 14.3 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 121 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Power Range –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Product Details The technical parameters of the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack are designed to meet all standards required by modern eye science. The base curve and diameter values accommodate a broad range of eye anatomies. Oxygen transmissibility (Dk/t) is among the most critical parameters for corneal health — allowing CO₂ to escape from beneath the lens — and the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack performs well above industry averages on this metric. Material choice is the foundation of the comfort-safety balance. The 38% water content is carefully optimised: too high and the lens draws moisture from your tear film causing dryness; too low and on-eye comfort suffers. UV protection provides an extra layer of defence against harmful UVA and UVB rays — though it does not replace sunglasses or  eyewear. The power range spans mild myopia through high myopia and into hyperopia, making the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack suitable for a wide spectrum of prescriptions. At contactlens365.com we hold stock across all available parameters and dispatch orders promptly. If you are unsure of your  details, please consult your eye care professional before ordering. Who Is It For? 💻 Screen-Heavy Professionals Ideal for extended computer or device use — HydraLuxe™ technology helps combat digital eye fatigue and dryness. 🏃 Active Lifestyles & Sports Stays securely centred during movement. Perfect for gym workouts, team sports, and outdoor activities. ✈️ Frequent Travellers No solution needed — simply wear and discard. The 90-pack covers 3 months for one eye; stock up before any trip. 👁️ Dry Eye Sufferers Users who previously struggled with lens dryness or discomfort often find the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day materially better than alternatives. 🌟 First-Time Lens Wearers A forgiving, comfortable starting point for anyone new to contact lenses — no storage or cleaning routine required. 🔆 UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — the highest available in contact lenses — shields against 96% UVA and over 99% UVB rays. How to Use 1Wash your hands thoroughly with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel before handling any lens. 2Remove the lens from its blister pack. Check both sides for any tears, discolouration, or deformation — never use a damaged lens. 3Verify orientation — the lens should form a bowl shape, not a plate. A correctly oriented edge will be smooth, not flared. 4Insert the lens by holding your upper and lower lids open with your non-dominant hand, then gently placing the lens onto your cornea. 5Blink gently to settle the lens. If vision is blurry or you feel discomfort, remove and reinsert. Persistent issues? Stop wearing and consult your eye doctor. 6Remove before sleep. As a daily disposable, discard the lens at the end of the day — never reuse it. Do not sleep in lenses unless specifically advised by your eye care professional. 7Avoid water contact. Remove lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub — water exposure significantly increases infection risk. ⚠️ Important: As daily disposables, the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack lenses do not require lens solution for storage. Never re-wear a used lens, and never rinse lenses with tap water or saliva. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero risk of  or expired lenses. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Track your parcel in real time from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure payment methods accepted. Your data is always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our customer care team is available 7 days a week to help with parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Set up a subscription and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack? No. As a daily disposable lens, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Simply open a new blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack? You can order the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack directly at contactlens365.com at competitive prices with secure payment and fast shipping. How long does one 90-pack last? A 90-lens box covers approximately 3 months for one eye. Two boxes (one per eye) are typically required for full daily wear over 3 months. Is the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day suitable for astigmatism? The spherical version does not correct astigmatism. A toric variant is available for astigmatic prescriptions — please consult your eye care professional to confirm which version is right for you. Can I swim while wearing these lenses? No. All contact lenses should be removed before swimming, showering, or entering a hot tub. Water exposure — including tap water — substantially raises the risk of eye infection. What is the current price of the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack? For the latest pricing and any active promotions, visit the Acuvue Oasys 1-Day 90 Pack product page at contactlens365.com. .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com ACUVUE® OASYS 6 Pack J&J's world-leading monthly lens in a 6-lens 3-month supply — HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology, extended wear option, and Class 1 UV protection. The ideal trial and monthly order format. ✦ Monthly / Extended Wear6 Lenses / BoxHYDRACLEAR® PlusDk/t 129Class 1 UV MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 129Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS 6 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's best- monthly silicone hydrogel lens — available in a 6-lens box at contactlens365.com. Built on Senofilcon A with HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology, the OASYS platform consistently tops comfort ratings in monthly lens category surveys, and its approval for up to 6 nights / 7 days of continuous extended wear makes it the most versatile monthly lens in the J&J portfolio. Whether worn daily with careful cleaning or as an  extended wear lens, ACUVUE® OASYS delivers outstanding oxygen supply, moisture retention, and optical performance. HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology is the comfort differentiator of the OASYS platform. It incorporates polyvinyl pyrrolidone (PVP) — a moisture-retaining agent — in higher concentration than standard OASYS lenses, creating a wetting agent-saturated silicone hydrogel that maintains surface wettability from first wear to the end of the monthly cycle. PVP is well-established in contact lens science as one of the most effective internal wetting agents available; its integration into the Senofilcon A matrix at elevated concentration results in a lens surface that resists dehydration even in challenging environments such as air-conditioned offices, low-humidity climates, and during extended screen use when blink rate drops. Senofilcon A with Dk/t 129 places ACUVUE® OASYS comfortably above the 87 Dk/t threshold considered clinically necessary for safe daily wear, and above the higher thresholds associated with  extended wear — supporting both corneal health during daily use and the physiological requirements of overnight wear. Class 1 UV protection blocks 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB with every lens, providing meaningful daily solar defence without any added steps or accessories. At contactlens365.com, all available OASYS parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. ✦ ACUVUE® OASYS is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous extended wear when professionally prescribed — combining HYDRACLEAR® Plus moisture, Dk/t 129 oxygen performance, and Class 1 UV protection in a single monthly lens. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm and 8.8 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 129 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies HYDRACLEAR® Plus Higher-concentration PVP moisture system integrated throughout Senofilcon A — providing exceptional surface wettability and sustained comfort from morning to night, across daily and extended wear cycles. Resists dehydration in air-conditioned environments and during prolonged screen use. Senofilcon A Johnson & Johnson Vision's proven silicone hydrogel polymer with Dk/t 129 — well above both daily wear and extended wear oxygen thresholds. Combined with HYDRACLEAR® Plus, it delivers the oxygen supply and comfort performance that have made ACUVUE® OASYS one of the world's most prescribed monthly lenses. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — the highest UV protection class in any contact lens. Daily solar defence integrated into every monthly lens. Who Is It For? 💧Comfort-First Monthly Wearers HYDRACLEAR® Plus is one of the most effective monthly lens moisture systems — consistently top-rated in user comfort surveys for both initial comfort and end-of-day performance. 🌙Extended Wear Users Up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous wear when professionally  — Dk/t 129 supports the corneal oxygen needs of overnight wear. 💻Screen & Office Workers HYDRACLEAR® Plus resists dehydration in low-humidity, air-conditioned environments and maintains comfort during extended screen use. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — built into every monthly lens without any extra steps. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store ACUVUE® OASYS? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, and store in a clean case with fresh solution. Replace solution and case regularly. Never use tap water or saliva. Can I sleep in ACUVUE® OASYS? ACUVUE® OASYS is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous wear when your eye care professional specifically prescribes it for extended use. Never sleep in lenses without  professional approval — extended wear significantly raises infection risk. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers approximately 3 months for one eye (one lens per month). Two boxes provide a full bilateral supply for 3 months. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises serious infection risk regardless of lens type. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. acuvue oasys 6 packacuvue oasys monthly 6hydraclear plus monthlysenofilcon a monthlyclass 1 uv monthlycontactlens365acuvue oasys 3 month supply This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Johnson & Johnson Vision, ACUVUE, OASYS, and HYDRACLEAR are trademarks of Johnson & Johnson Vision Care, Inc. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

a 12-lens 6-month supply — HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology, extended wear approval, and Class 1 UV in the most popular OASYS pack size. ✦ Monthly / Extended Wear12 Lenses / BoxHYDRACLEAR® PlusDk/t 129Class 1 UV MonthlyWear Type 12Lenses / Box 129Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS 12 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's best- monthly silicone hydrogel lens — available in a 12-lens box at contactlens365.com. Built on Senofilcon A with HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology, the OASYS platform consistently tops comfort ratings in monthly lens category surveys, and its approval for up to 6 nights / 7 days of continuous extended wear makes it the most versatile monthly lens in the J&J portfolio. Whether worn daily with careful cleaning or as an  extended wear lens, ACUVUE® OASYS delivers outstanding oxygen supply, moisture retention, and optical performance. HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology is the comfort differentiator of the OASYS platform. It incorporates polyvinyl pyrrolidone (PVP) — a moisture-retaining agent — in higher concentration than standard OASYS lenses, creating a wetting agent-saturated silicone hydrogel that maintains surface wettability from first wear to the end of the monthly cycle. PVP is well-established in contact lens science as one of the most effective internal wetting agents available; its integration into the Senofilcon A matrix at elevated concentration results in a lens surface that resists dehydration even in challenging environments such as air-conditioned offices, low-humidity climates, and during extended screen use when blink rate drops. Senofilcon A with Dk/t 129 places ACUVUE® OASYS comfortably above the 87 Dk/t threshold considered clinically necessary for safe daily wear, and above the higher thresholds associated with  extended wear — supporting both corneal health during daily use and the physiological requirements of overnight wear. Class 1 UV protection blocks 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB with every lens, providing meaningful daily solar defence without any added steps or accessories. At contactlens365.com, all available OASYS parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. ✦ ACUVUE® OASYS is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous extended wear when professionally prescribed — combining HYDRACLEAR® Plus moisture, Dk/t 129 oxygen performance, and Class 1 UV protection in a single monthly lens. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm and 8.8 mm Diameter 14.0 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 129 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 12 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies HYDRACLEAR® Plus Higher-concentration PVP moisture system integrated throughout Senofilcon A — providing exceptional surface wettability and sustained comfort from morning to night, across daily and extended wear cycles. Resists dehydration in air-conditioned environments and during prolonged screen use. Senofilcon A Johnson & Johnson Vision's proven silicone hydrogel polymer with Dk/t 129 — well above both daily wear and extended wear oxygen thresholds. Combined with HYDRACLEAR® Plus, it delivers the oxygen supply and comfort performance that have made ACUVUE® OASYS one of the world's most prescribed monthly lenses. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — the highest UV protection class in any contact lens. Daily solar defence integrated into every monthly lens. Who Is It For? 💧Comfort-First Monthly Wearers HYDRACLEAR® Plus is one of the most effective monthly lens moisture systems — consistently top-rated in user comfort surveys for both initial comfort and end-of-day performance. 🌙Extended Wear Users Up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous wear when professionally  — Dk/t 129 supports the corneal oxygen needs of overnight wear. 💻Screen & Office Workers HYDRACLEAR® Plus resists dehydration in low-humidity, air-conditioned environments and maintains comfort during extended screen use. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — built into every monthly lens without any extra steps. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store ACUVUE® OASYS? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, and store in a clean case with fresh solution. Replace solution and case regularly. Never use tap water or saliva. Can I sleep in ACUVUE® OASYS? ACUVUE® OASYS is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days continuous wear when your eye care professional specifically prescribes it for extended use. Never sleep in lenses without  professional approval — extended wear significantly raises infection risk. How long does one 12-pack last? A 12-lens box covers approximately 6 months for one eye (one lens per month). Two boxes provide a full bilateral supply for 6 months. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS 12 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises serious infection risk regardless of lens type. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,102,204,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,102,204,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack J&J's flagship monthly toric lens — HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology and BLINK STABILIZED® Design for sustained moisture and reliable astigmatism correction across the full 6-night/7-day extended wear cycle. ✦ Monthly / Extended Wear Toric6 Lenses / BoxHYDRACLEAR® PlusBLINK STABILIZED®Class 1 UV MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 129Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's premium monthly toric contact lens — available at contactlens365.com for astigmatism wearers who want the performance and comfort  of the ACUVUE® OASYS platform in a monthly replacement format. It combines HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology for outstanding moisture retention, BLINK STABILIZED® Design for reliable axis orientation, and Class 1 UV protection — with the added approval for up to 6 nights/7 days of continuous wear when prescribed by an eye care professional. HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology is the defining comfort feature of the OASYS platform. It incorporates a wetting agent — polyvinyl pyrrolidone (PVP) — throughout the Senofilcon A silicone hydrogel matrix in higher concentration than the original ACUVUE® OASYS, creating a lens surface with exceptional long-term wettability. Clinical evaluations rate HYDRACLEAR® Plus as one of the most effective moisture systems in the monthly toric category — with users consistently reporting comfort levels that match spherical lens wear rather than the historically more challenging toric wear experience. BLINK STABILIZED® Design in the monthly OASYS for Astigmatism uses the same principle as the daily version: four stabilisation zones interact with the natural eyelid blink to re-orient the lens to its correct axis with every blink. In the monthly format, this is supported by the additional mass and geometry of a thicker lens design — allowing the stabilisation zones to work with greater consistency than in thinner daily alternatives. The result is a monthly toric that users describe as exceptionally stable even during prolonged downward gaze, rapid head movement, and physical activity. ✦ ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days of continuous extended wear when prescribed by an eye care professional — the only toric lens in its category with this approval combined with HYDRACLEAR® Plus comfort and BLINK STABILIZED® orientation stability. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.5 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 129 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies HYDRACLEAR® Plus An advanced moisture system with higher PVP (polyvinyl pyrrolidone) concentration than the original OASYS — creating a lens surface that remains wettable, comfortable, and optically stable throughout daily wear and extended wear cycles. One of the most consistently highly rated moisture systems in clinical evaluations of monthly toric lenses. BLINK STABILIZED® Four stabilisation zones interact with the natural blink to re-orient the lens to its correct axis position consistently throughout the day. Combined with the OASYS platform's higher-mass geometry, provides exceptional toric stability even during physical activity and rapid gaze changes. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — maximum UV protection class available in any contact lens. Understanding Your Toric  Enter Sphere (SPH), Cylinder (CYL), and Axis separately for right eye (OD) and left eye (OS) at contactlens365.com. Available CYL: –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D. Axis: 10°–180° in 10° steps. If your values fall between available options, consult your eye care professional for the appropriate substitute — never self-substitute toric parameters. Who Is It For? 👁️ Monthly Astigmatism Wearers Premium monthly toric with HYDRACLEAR® Plus comfort and BLINK STABILIZED® stability — widely rated as one of the most comfortable monthly toric lenses available. 🌙  Extended Wear Users Up to 6 nights/7 days continuous wear when prescribed — the only  extended-wear toric in its class, for professional travellers and shift workers who require this flexibility. 💧 Comfort-First Toric Wearers HYDRACLEAR® Plus — a higher-concentration moisture system than standard OASYS — for wearers who prioritise comfort throughout long wearing days. ☀️ UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — built into every monthly toric lens. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Rub with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Replace case every 1–3 months. How is a toric  different? Includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle in addition to Sphere (SPH). Enter all three values correctly when ordering. How long does one 6-pack last? ~3 months for one eye (one lens per month). Two boxes for full bilateral 3-month supply. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing and fast shipping. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. acuvue oasys for astigmatism 6 packmonthly toric acuvuehydraclear plus toricblink stabilized monthly toricclass 1 uv monthly toricsenofilcon a toriccontactlens365acuvue oasys toric specs This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. Johnson & Johnson Vision, ACUVUE, OASYS, HYDRACLEAR, and BLINK STABILIZED are trademarks of Johnson & Johnson Vision Care, Inc. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

monthly toric lens — HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology and BLINK STABILIZED® Design for sustained moisture and reliable astigmatism correction across the full 6-night/7-day extended wear cycle. ✦ Monthly / Extended Wear Toric6 Lenses / BoxHYDRACLEAR® PlusBLINK STABILIZED®Class 1 UV MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 129Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's premium monthly toric contact lens — available at contactlens365.com for astigmatism wearers who want the performance and comfort  of the ACUVUE® OASYS platform in a monthly replacement format. It combines HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology for outstanding moisture retention, BLINK STABILIZED® Design for reliable axis orientation, and Class 1 UV protection — with the added approval for up to 6 nights/7 days of continuous wear when prescribed by an eye care professional. HYDRACLEAR® Plus Technology is the defining comfort feature of the OASYS platform. It incorporates a wetting agent — polyvinyl pyrrolidone (PVP) — throughout the Senofilcon A silicone hydrogel matrix in higher concentration than the original ACUVUE® OASYS, creating a lens surface with exceptional long-term wettability. Clinical evaluations rate HYDRACLEAR® Plus as one of the most effective moisture systems in the monthly toric category — with users consistently reporting comfort levels that match spherical lens wear rather than the historically more challenging toric wear experience. BLINK STABILIZED® Design in the monthly OASYS for Astigmatism uses the same principle as the daily version: four stabilisation zones interact with the natural eyelid blink to re-orient the lens to its correct axis with every blink. In the monthly format, this is supported by the additional mass and geometry of a thicker lens design — allowing the stabilisation zones to work with greater consistency than in thinner daily alternatives. The result is a monthly toric that users describe as exceptionally stable even during prolonged downward gaze, rapid head movement, and physical activity. ✦ ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism is  for up to 6 nights / 7 days of continuous extended wear when prescribed by an eye care professional — the only toric lens in its category with this approval combined with HYDRACLEAR® Plus comfort and BLINK STABILIZED® orientation stability. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.5 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 129 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Monthly / Up to 6 nights continuous Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies HYDRACLEAR® Plus An advanced moisture system with higher PVP (polyvinyl pyrrolidone) concentration than the original OASYS — creating a lens surface that remains wettable, comfortable, and optically stable throughout daily wear and extended wear cycles. One of the most consistently highly rated moisture systems in clinical evaluations of monthly toric lenses. BLINK STABILIZED® Four stabilisation zones interact with the natural blink to re-orient the lens to its correct axis position consistently throughout the day. Combined with the OASYS platform's higher-mass geometry, provides exceptional toric stability even during physical activity and rapid gaze changes. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — maximum UV protection class available in any contact lens. Understanding Your Toric  Enter Sphere (SPH), Cylinder (CYL), and Axis separately for right eye (OD) and left eye (OS) at contactlens365.com. Available CYL: –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D. Axis: 10°–180° in 10° steps. If your values fall between available options, consult your eye care professional for the appropriate substitute — never self-substitute toric parameters. Who Is It For? 👁️Monthly Astigmatism Wearers Premium monthly toric with HYDRACLEAR® Plus comfort and BLINK STABILIZED® stability — widely rated as one of the most comfortable monthly toric lenses available. 🌙 Extended Wear Users Up to 6 nights/7 days continuous wear when prescribed — the only  extended-wear toric in its class, for professional travellers and shift workers who require this flexibility. 💧Comfort-First Toric Wearers HYDRACLEAR® Plus — a higher-concentration moisture system than standard OASYS — for wearers who prioritise comfort throughout long wearing days. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — built into every monthly toric lens. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Rub with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Replace case every 1–3 months. How is a toric  different? Includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle in addition to Sphere (SPH). Enter all three values correctly when ordering. How long does one 6-pack last? ~3 months for one eye (one lens per month). Two boxes for full bilateral 3-month supply. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing and fast shipping. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS for Astigmatism 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use.
