*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0} :root{--ink:#0d1a24;--body:#243340;--mid:#445260;--accent:#0066cc;--pale:#eef5fb;--border:#c5daea;--bg:#f5f9fc;--white:#ffffff} html{scroll-behavior:smooth} body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--ink);line-height:1.75;font-size:17px} .wrap{max-width:920px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 28px 100px} .hero{background:var(--white);border-radius:24px;padding:56px 60px;margin-bottom:40px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 48px rgba(0,102,204,.10),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.04)} .hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,102,204,.05) 0%,transparent 60%);pointer-events:none} .hero-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px} .hero-eyebrow-brand{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent)} .hero-eyebrow-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--border)} .hero-eyebrow-site{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mid)} .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 30 Pack J&J's leading daily toric in a 30-lens monthly supply — BLINK STABILIZED® Design, HydraLuxe® Technology, and Class 1 UV for precise daily astigmatism correction with all-day comfort. ✦ Daily Toric30 Lenses / BoxBLINK STABILIZED®HydraLuxe® TechnologyClass 1 UV DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 103Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 30 Pack brings Johnson & Johnson Vision's most advanced daily toric technology to astigmatism wearers in a convenient 30-lens monthly supply available at contactlens365.com. Identical in specification to the 90-pack — same Senofilcon A material, same BLINK STABILIZED® Design, same HydraLuxe® Technology, same Class 1 UV protection — the 30-pack is the ideal choice for first-time wearers trialling the lens for a full month, or for experienced wearers who prefer monthly ordering flexibility. The ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism was developed to resolve the central challenge of daily toric lenses: orientation stability. While monthly toric lenses can rely on the weight and thickness distribution of a larger lens to maintain axis position, daily lenses — which are thinner and lighter — require a more deliberate design solution. BLINK STABILIZED® Design uses four peripheral stabilisation zones that work with the natural mechanics of the blink to actively re-orient the lens to its correct axis position with every blink. This means that even after prolonged downward gaze (such as reading or screen work), rapid head movement, or physical activity, the lens returns consistently to the prescribed axis angle within a blink or two. HydraLuxe® Technology addresses the tear film disruption that toric lens wear can introduce. The stabilisation geometry of a toric lens modifies how the eyelid interacts with the lens surface during blinking — and this altered lid-lens dynamic can affect tear film stability. HydraLuxe® incorporates tear-like molecules that integrate directly with the natural tear film layers, providing active reinforcement of the mucin-like and aqueous components and maintaining lens surface wettability throughout the full wearing day. The result is a daily toric lens that users describe as comfortable from morning to evening — not just for the first few hours. ✦ Same specification as the 90-pack: BLINK STABILIZED® Design, HydraLuxe® Technology, Class 1 UV. The 30-pack is ideal for first-time trialists or monthly-order preference wearers. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.3 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 103 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies BLINK STABILIZED® Four peripheral zones use natural blink mechanics to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis — reliable cylindrical correction across all gaze directions, head positions, and activities. HydraLuxe® Technology Tear-like molecules integrated throughout the lens actively reinforce the natural tear film — supporting mucin and aqueous layers for sustained comfort and surface wettability throughout the full wearing day. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — maximum available UV protection in a daily toric lens. Who Is It For? 🌟First-Time Trialists Trial a full month under professional guidance before committing to the 90-pack for better per-lens value. 👁️Astigmatism Wearers Precise cylindrical correction with proven BLINK STABILIZED® axis stability — the benchmark daily toric for reliable, comfortable astigmatism correction. 🔄Monthly Orderers Prefer monthly reordering? The 30-pack provides a full month per eye with premium specification. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection every day — maximum solar defence built into every lens. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need solution for ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 30 Pack? No — daily disposable. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard at end of day. How is a toric  different? A toric  includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle, in addition to the standard Sphere (SPH). All three values must match available parameters exactly. What if my CYL or axis is not available? Consult your eye care professional for the closest appropriate substitute. Never self-substitute toric parameters. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 30 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 30 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. acuvue oasys 1-day astigmatism 30 packdaily toric 30 packblink stabilized designhydraluxe technologycontactlens365senofilcon a toric daily 30 This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. .hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,102,204,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,102,204,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,102,204,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } Acuvue · Johnson & Johnson Vision contactlens365.com ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 90 Pack J&J's premium daily toric in a 3-month 90-lens supply — BLINK STABILIZED® Design, HydraLuxe® Technology, and Class 1 UV protection for precise, comfortable astigmatism correction every day. ✦ Daily Toric90 Lenses / BoxBLINK STABILIZED®HydraLuxe® TechnologyClass 1 UV DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 103Dk/t O₂ 38%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 90 Pack is Johnson & Johnson Vision's premium daily toric lens available in a 90-lens 3-month supply box at contactlens365.com — representing the most technologically complete daily astigmatism correction option currently available. It combines BLINK STABILIZED® Design for consistent axis orientation, HydraLuxe® Technology for active tear film integration, and Class 1 UV protection in a daily disposable format that delivers stable visual correction and genuine all-day comfort for astigmatism wearers. Correcting astigmatism with a daily contact lens requires solving two problems simultaneously: providing an accurate cylindrical correction at a precise axis angle, and ensuring that orientation is maintained throughout the day regardless of eye movement, head position, or the millions of blinks that occur during a wearing day. BLINK STABILIZED® Design addresses the orientation challenge through four stabilisation zones strategically positioned around the lens periphery. These zones interact with the natural eyelid mechanics during each blink — using the blink itself to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis position. The result is an orientation stability that clinical studies consistently rate as excellent, and that users describe as reliable under all conditions including physical activity, downward gaze, and extended screen use. HydraLuxe® Technology takes a sophisticated approach to daily lens moisture. Rather than simply adding wetting agents to the lens surface, HydraLuxe® incorporates a network of tear-like molecules that integrate with the natural tear film — actively reinforcing the mucin-like layer responsible for tear film stability and the aqueous layer responsible for corneal lubrication. This is particularly relevant for toric lens wearers, as toric stabilisation geometry affects lid-lens interactions during blinking, which can in turn disrupt the tear film more than spherical lens wear. HydraLuxe® compensates for this by actively supporting tear film integrity throughout the day. The 90-pack provides 3 months per eye — the most cost-efficient format for committed daily toric wearers. ✦ ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism is the only daily toric combining BLINK STABILIZED® orientation stability, HydraLuxe® tear film integration, and Class 1 UV protection — the most complete daily toric available for astigmatism correction. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Senofilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 38% Base Curve (BC) 8.5 mm Diameter 14.3 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 103 UV Protection Class 1 — UVA 96%, UVB 99%+ Sphere (SPH) –9.00 to +4.00 D Cylinder (CYL) –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D Axis 10°–180° (10° steps) Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer Johnson & Johnson Vision Key Technologies BLINK STABILIZED® Four stabilisation zones interact with the eyelid during each natural blink to consistently re-orient the lens to its correct axis position. Maintains cylindrical correction alignment across all gaze directions, head positions, and activities throughout the full wearing day. HydraLuxe® Technology A network of tear-like molecules that integrates with the natural tear film to reinforce both mucin-like and aqueous layers. Actively supports tear film stability throughout the day — particularly important for toric wearers whose lens geometry affects lid-lens blink interactions. Class 1 UV 96% UVA and 99%+ UVB blocked — the highest UV protection class in contact lenses. Daily solar defence without any extra steps. Understanding Your Toric  A toric lens  includes three parameters: Sphere (SPH) for refractive correction, Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power, and Axis for the orientation angle. Available CYL: –0.75, –1.25, –1.75, –2.25 D. Axis: 10°–180° in 10° steps. Enter right eye (OD) and left eye (OS) values separately at contactlens365.com. Consult your eye care professional if your values fall between available options. Who Is It For? 👁️Daily Astigmatism Wearers The benchmark daily toric — BLINK STABILIZED® Design and HydraLuxe® Technology deliver reliable axis stability and all-day comfort in a fresh-every-day format. 💰90-Pack Value Buyers 3-month supply per eye at a significantly better cost per lens than the 30-pack. Ideal for committed daily toric wearers. ☀️UV-Conscious Wearers Class 1 UV protection — maximum available — built into every daily lens without any extra steps. 💻Screen Users HydraLuxe® Technology actively supports tear film stability during extended screen use, maintaining comfort and visual acuity when blink rate drops. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need solution for ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 90 Pack? No — daily disposable. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard at end of day. How is a toric  different? A toric  includes Cylinder (CYL) for astigmatism power and Axis for orientation angle, in addition to the standard Sphere (SPH). All three values must match available parameters exactly. What if my CYL or axis is not available? Consult your eye care professional for the closest appropriate substitute. Never self-substitute toric parameters. Where can I buy ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 90 Pack? Order at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim in ACUVUE® OASYS 1-Day for Astigmatism 90 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or hot tub use. What is the current price? Visit contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and active promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. acuvue oasys 1-day astigmatism 90 packdaily toric 90 packblink stabilized designhydraluxe technologyclass 1 uv toricsenofilcon a toric dailycontactlens365acuvue toric 90 This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } CooperVision · Biomedics contactlens365.com Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack CooperVision's reliable two-week hydrogel lens — non-ionic efrofilcon A material resists protein deposits and Balanced Progressive™ Technology improves low-light vision quality. ✦ 2-Weekly Disposable6 Lenses / BoxBalanced Progressive™Non-Ionic HydrogelBC 8.6 mm · Dia 14.2 mm 2-WeeklyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 55%Water Content Non-IonicMaterial ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack is a proven, cost-effective two-week replacement hydrogel contact lens available at contactlens365.com. Built on efrofilcon A — a non-ionic hydrogel with 55% water content — the Biomedics 55 Evolution offers a balanced combination of optical performance, deposit resistance, and value that has made it a long-standing choice for wearers seeking reliable fortnightly replacement without premium silicone hydrogel pricing. The non-ionic character of efrofilcon A is a genuine practical advantage in the two-week replacement context. Ionic hydrogel materials carry a net negative charge that attracts positively charged tear proteins — particularly lysozyme, which is abundant in the human tear film and is one of the primary contributors to the "haze" and discomfort that characterise deposit-laden lenses in week two of wear. Non-ionic polymers do not carry this attraction, meaning Biomedics 55 Evolution accumulates protein deposits more slowly and retains better optical clarity and surface comfort through the full fortnightly replacement cycle. Balanced Progressive™ Technology gives Biomedics 55 Evolution a measurable optical advantage over standard spherical lens designs. The aspheric front surface is designed to reduce spherical aberration — the optical distortion that causes haloes, reduced contrast sensitivity, and diminished low-light visual performance in conventional spherical lenses. The practical benefit is most pronounced during night driving and in dim environments where pupil dilation increases the impact of spherical aberration on visual quality. 🔬 Non-ionic efrofilcon A resists lysozyme deposition better than ionic hydrogels — maintaining comfort and clarity through both weeks of the replacement cycle. Balanced Progressive™ Technology's aspheric design improves low-light vision quality beyond standard spherical lens designs. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Efrofilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 55% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 21 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +4.00 D Replacement Schedule 2-Weekly (14 days) Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technology Balanced Progressive™ Technology An aspheric optical design that reduces spherical aberration — the distortion responsible for halos, reduced contrast, and poor low-light performance in conventional spherical lenses. Most noticeable benefit is during night driving and in dim indoor environments where pupil dilation increases the practical impact of spherical aberration. Non-Ionic Efrofilcon A A non-ionic hydrogel that lacks the surface charge that attracts lysozyme and other tear proteins. This results in slower deposit accumulation and better maintenance of surface wettability and optical clarity through both weeks of the replacement cycle — a meaningful advantage over ionic hydrogel alternatives in the two-week category. Who Is It For? 💰Value-Conscious Wearers Reliable two-week performance at a significantly lower cost than premium monthly silicone hydrogels — excellent value for wearers who want consistent quality without premium pricing. 🌙Night Drivers Balanced Progressive™ Technology's aspheric design reduces halos and improves contrast in low-light — a practical benefit for regular night drivers. 🔄Two-Week Format Preference Fortnightly replacement balances the hygiene benefits of frequent replacement with cost advantages over daily lenses. Biomedics 55 Evolution is a proven option in this format. 👁️Protein-Sensitive Tear Chemistry Wearers whose tear film is high in lysozyme often find non-ionic hydrogels like efrofilcon A maintain better comfort through week two than ionic alternatives. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect before insertion — check for tears. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged or inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Remove and recheck if vision or comfort is poor. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds, rinse thoroughly, store in fresh solution. 5Replace every 14 days — note the opening date. Do not extend beyond two weeks regardless of how the lens feels. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per two weeks). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Biomedics 55 Evolution 6 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. biomedics 55 evolution 6 packcoopervision biomedics 55balanced progressive technologyefrofilcon a lenstwo week replacement lensnon-ionic hydrogel contact lenscontactlens365biomedics 55 specs This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. h1{font-size:2.1rem}.hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.suited-grid,.why-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.tech-row{flex-direction:column}} CooperVision contactlens365.com MyDay® Daily Disposable 30 Pack CooperVision's premium daily silicone hydrogel lens — Smart Silicone™ technology and Aquaform® Comfort Science deliver Dk/t 100 oxygen performance with a naturally moist, comfortable 54% water content surface. 30 lenses per box. ✦ Daily Disposable30 Lenses / BoxSmart Silicone™Aquaform® Comfort ScienceStenfilcon ABC 8.4 mm · Dia 14.2 mm DailyWear Type 30Lenses / Box 100Dk/t O₂ 54%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision MyDay® Daily Disposable 30 Pack is CooperVision's flagship premium daily silicone hydrogel lens — available at contactlens365.com in the convenient 30-lens monthly format. The MyDay is built on Stenfilcon A with two proprietary technologies that together solve the central tension of silicone hydrogel lens design: Smart Silicone™ achieves Dk/t 100 oxygen transmissibility without sacrificing water content, and Aquaform® Comfort Science integrates moisture structurally throughout the material rather than relying on surface treatments that deplete over the course of the day. The result is a daily disposable lens with 54% water content and Dk/t 100 — a combination that most silicone hydrogel platforms cannot achieve simultaneously. Where conventional silicone hydrogels trade lower water content for higher oxygen performance, Smart Silicone™'s unique molecular architecture provides both. For wearers who have previously had to choose between oxygen performance and all-day moisture comfort, the MyDay 30 Pack represents a genuinely different option in the daily lens category. 🌿 Same lens as the 90 Pack — identical Stenfilcon A material, Smart Silicone™ technology, and Aquaform® Comfort Science. The 30-pack is the monthly ordering format for MyDay wearers who prefer flexibility, or who are trying the lens for the first time before committing to bulk stock. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Stenfilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 54% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 100 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +6.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 30 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technologies Smart Silicone™ CooperVision's innovative approach to silicone hydrogel architecture — using fewer, larger silicone molecules rather than the dense packing of conventional silicone hydrogels. This molecular design achieves Dk/t 100 oxygen transmissibility while preserving significantly more space within the polymer network for water, producing a lens with a uniquely high water content of 54% alongside premium oxygen performance. Aquaform® Comfort Science Moisture naturally integrated throughout the Stenfilcon A polymer matrix — not applied as a surface coating or wetting agent. Because water is a structural part of the material itself rather than an additive, moisture levels remain consistent from the first hour of wear to the last, without the depletion that affects surface-treated daily lenses. Product Details Smart Silicone™ technology addresses a fundamental limitation of conventional silicone hydrogel design. Standard silicone hydrogels achieve high Dk/t by packing silicone molecules densely within the polymer network — which necessarily displaces water and produces lenses that typically contain 33–46% water. Smart Silicone™ uses fewer, larger silicone units that achieve the same oxygen transmissibility while preserving significantly more of the polymer's volume for water retention, producing a 54% water content alongside Dk/t 100 in the same daily lens. Aquaform® Comfort Science complements Smart Silicone™ by ensuring the high water content is maintained throughout the wearing day rather than progressively lost. Because moisture is structurally integrated within the Stenfilcon A material rather than applied as a surface wetting agent, it does not deplete with blinking, handling, or exposure to challenging environments. The wearing experience at hour 14 is therefore genuinely comparable to hour 1 — not a gradual decline from comfortable to acceptable. The 30-pack provides approximately one month's supply per eye, making it the right format for first-time MyDay wearers evaluating the lens before moving to the 90-pack, or for wearers who prefer the flexibility of placing a fresh order each month. The 90-pack version of MyDay is available at contactlens365.com for those who prefer the economy format — the lens specification is identical in both pack sizes. Always confirm your current  with your eye care professional before ordering. Who Is It For? 🌟First-Time MyDay Wearers The 30-pack is the ideal trial format — a full month of wear per eye to evaluate Smart Silicone™ comfort and Aquaform® moisture before committing to the 90-pack bulk format. 💧Comfort-First Daily Wearers 54% water content and naturally integrated Aquaform® moisture deliver the kind of all-day comfort feel usually associated with high-water hydrogel lenses — in a premium silicone hydrogel package. 💻Screen-Heavy Professionals Consistently high moisture throughout the day directly supports comfortable extended screen use — the 54% water content buffers against the tear film disruption caused by reduced blinking during focused screen work. 🔄Flexible Monthly Orderers Prefer to order fresh each month rather than hold bulk stock? The 30-pack gives full MyDay performance with monthly ordering flexibility. How to Use 1Wash your hands thoroughly with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel before handling any lens. 2Open the blister carefully — peel back the foil without squeezing the pack. 3Check orientation — the lens should form a smooth bowl shape. Flared edges mean it is inside-out. Never insert an inside-out lens. 4Insert gently by holding lids open and placing the lens onto the cornea. Blink to settle. 5Check comfort and vision. Discomfort or blur? Remove, inspect, and reinsert. Persistent issues — consult your eye doctor. 6No solution needed. As a daily disposable, no lens case or cleaning solution is required. 7Remove before sleep unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear. 8Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable lens. 💡 Tip: Satisfied with MyDay 30 Pack? The 90-pack at contactlens365.com provides the same lens at significantly better per-unit value — the practical upgrade once you have confirmed fit and comfort over a full month of daily wear. Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero risk of  or expired lenses. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Track your parcel in real time from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure payment methods accepted. Your data is always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our customer care team is available 7 days a week to help with parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Set up a subscription and never run out of your lenses again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. Frequently Asked Questions What is the difference between MyDay 30 Pack and 90 Pack? The lens is completely identical in both packs — same Stenfilcon A material, same Smart Silicone™ technology, same Aquaform® Comfort Science, same specifications. The 30-pack provides approximately one month's supply per eye. The 90-pack provides three months per eye and offers a better per-lens price. The 30-pack is the right format for first-time wearers and those who prefer monthly ordering flexibility. Do I need lens solution with MyDay? No. MyDay is a daily disposable lens — open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. No cleaning solution, no storage case, and no maintenance are required. How long does one 30-pack last? A 30-lens box provides approximately one month of supply for one eye, assuming daily wear. Two boxes — one per eye — provide approximately one month for both eyes. Is MyDay suitable for astigmatism? The standard MyDay spherical lens does not correct astigmatism. CooperVision offers a separate MyDay Toric variant — consult your eye care professional about which version is right for your . Can I swim while wearing MyDay? No. Contact lenses of any kind should be removed before swimming, showering, or entering a hot tub. Water exposure significantly raises the risk of serious eye infection, including Acanthamoeba keratitis. What is the current price? For the latest pricing and any current promotions, visit the MyDay Daily Disposable 30 Pack product page at contactlens365.com. Subscribing to the newsletter also provides access to exclusive discounts. Can I sleep in MyDay? No — unless your eye care professional has specifically  extended wear for you. MyDay is designed for daily wear and should be removed each evening before sleep. myday daily disposable 30 packcoopervision myday 30 packsmart silicone technology dailyaquaform comfort sciencestenfilcon a daily lenssilicone hydrogel daily disposablecontactlens365buy myday 30 packcoopervision daily lens This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. CooperVision, MyDay, Smart Silicone, and Aquaform are trademarks of CooperVision Inc. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

.hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1.05;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:14px} .hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--accent)} .hero-tagline{font-size:1rem;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;margin-bottom:32px;max-width:520px} .hero-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-bottom:36px} .chip{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:40px;padding:6px 16px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .chip.featured{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-color:var(--accent)} .hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px} .stat{background:var(--pale);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center} .stat-val{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;display:block} .stat-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--mid);margin-top:5px;display:block} .trust-bar{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:18px 28px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px 32px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px} .trust-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--body)} .trust-icon{width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--pale);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px} p{font-size:17px;color:var(--body);margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.85} strong{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700} h2{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:1.6rem;color:var(--ink);margin:44px 0 14px;position:relative;padding-bottom:12px} h2::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:44px;height:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px} h3{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);margin:24px 0 10px} .table-wrap{border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,122,94,.08);margin:18px 0 32px} table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:15px} thead th{background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);padding:13px 18px;text-align:left;font-weight:700;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase} td{padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--body);font-weight:500} tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none} tr:nth-child(even) td{background:var(--pale)} td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);width:42%} .highlight{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pale) 0%,rgba(0,122,94,.07) 100%);border-left:4px solid var(--accent);border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:17px 22px;margin:22px 0} .highlight p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .tech-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;margin:16px 0 26px} .tech-pill{background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 18px;flex:1;min-width:190px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .tech-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,122,94,.10)} .tech-pill-name{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px} .tech-pill-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .suited-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .suited-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:17px 18px;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s} .suited-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 4px 18px rgba(0,122,94,.10)} .suited-card-icon{font-size:21px;margin-bottom:7px;display:block} .suited-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .suited-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .steps{list-style:none;margin:16px 0 26px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px} .step{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:flex-start;background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:14px 16px} .step-num{flex-shrink:0;width:28px;height:28px;background:var(--accent);color:var(--white);border-radius:7px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:800;font-size:12px} .step-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:500;line-height:1.6} .step-text strong{color:var(--ink)} .why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:13px;margin:18px 0 30px} .why-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:20px 16px;text-align:center;transition:border-color .2s} .why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .why-icon{font-size:24px;margin-bottom:9px} .why-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:5px} .why-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.55} .faq{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin-top:18px} .faq-item{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:17px 20px;transition:border-color .2s} .faq-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .faq-q{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:15.5px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:9px;margin-bottom:7px} .faq-q::before{content:'Q';flex-shrink:0;background:var(--pale);color:var(--accent);border-radius:6px;width:22px;height:22px;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-top:1px} .faq-a{font-size:15px;color:var(--body);font-weight:400;padding-left:31px;line-height:1.65} .screen-tip{background:#fff8e6;border-left:4px solid #e6a817;border-radius:0 13px 13px 0;padding:14px 20px;margin:18px 0} .screen-tip p{margin:0;font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:600} .rx-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin:14px 0 26px} .rx-card{background:var(--white);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;transition:border-color .2s} .rx-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent)} .rx-card-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:5px} .rx-card-title{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:4px} .rx-card-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--body);line-height:1.55} .tags{margin-top:44px;padding-top:22px;border-top:1.5px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px} .tag{background:var(--white);color:var(--body);border:1.5px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:5px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;transition:background .15s,border-color .15s} .tag:hover{background:var(--pale);border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--ink)} .note{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--mid);margin-top:22px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-weight:500} @media(max-width:660px){ .hero{padding:34px 24px} .hero h1{font-size:1.9rem} .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)} .suited-grid,.why-grid,.rx-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr} .tech-row{flex-direction:column} } CooperVision · MyDay contactlens365.com MyDay® Daily Disposable 90 Pack CooperVision's premium daily silicone hydrogel lens with Smart Silicone™ chemistry — a 3-month 90-lens supply delivering exceptional oxygen performance with a uniquely soft, hydrogel-like comfort feel. ✦ Daily Disposable90 Lenses / BoxSmart Silicone™Aquaform® TechnologyBC 8.4 mm · Dia 14.2 mm DailyWear Type 90Lenses / Box 100Dk/t O₂ 54%Water Content ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision MyDay® Daily Disposable 90 Pack is available at contactlens365.com as CooperVision's most innovative daily silicone hydrogel lens — in a convenient 90-lens box providing a full 3-month supply per eye. MyDay® represents a significant advance in daily lens material science through its proprietary Smart Silicone™ chemistry, which challenges the conventional trade-off between oxygen performance and on-eye comfort that has characterised silicone hydrogel lenses since the category launched. Traditional silicone hydrogel daily lenses use relatively high silicone content to achieve their Dk/t target — typically achieving 70–100+ Dk/t at the cost of a stiffer, less hydrophilic material that requires surface coatings to maintain adequate wettability. These coatings, while effective initially, are subject to depletion through blinking and tear film interaction, leading to reduced comfort as the wearing day progresses. MyDay® approaches the challenge differently: Smart Silicone™ chemistry achieves Dk/t 100 using less silicone than competing designs, meaning more of the Stenfilcon A material is occupied by water-attracting components. The result is a lens that reaches the same oxygen performance benchmark with a naturally softer, more hydrophilic structure — no surface coatings required, no comfort depletion over the course of the day. Aquaform® Technology complements Smart Silicone™ by locking water molecules throughout the polymer matrix, maintaining consistent hydration from first insertion through to end-of-day removal. Clinical evaluations consistently show MyDay® rated among the most comfortable daily lenses by both new wearers and experienced users switching from other silicone hydrogel dailies. The 90-pack is the best-value format for committed MyDay® wearers. 🧬 Smart Silicone™ uses less silicone to reach Dk/t 100 — leaving more room in the material for water-retaining components. The result: silicone-level oxygen performance with hydrogel-level softness and moisture, in a fresh daily lens. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Stenfilcon A (Silicone Hydrogel) Water Content 54% Base Curve (BC) 8.4 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 100 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –10.00 to +8.00 D Replacement Schedule Daily Disposable Pack Contents 90 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technology Smart Silicone™ A novel silicone chemistry architecture that achieves Dk/t 100 using a reduced quantity of silicone — allowing more of the Stenfilcon A polymer to be composed of naturally water-retaining, hydrophilic components. Eliminates the need for surface coatings. The lens feels softer and moister than conventional SiHy dailies throughout the entire wearing day. Aquaform® Technology CooperVision's proprietary water-locking technology naturally integrated throughout the Stenfilcon A matrix. Works with Smart Silicone™ to lock hydration throughout the lens — not just at the surface — ensuring consistent moisture from insertion to removal without dependency on external wetting agents or coatings. Who Is It For? 💧Soft & Moist Feel Seekers Smart Silicone™ chemistry creates a perceptibly softer, moister-feeling lens than conventional SiHy dailies — a meaningful difference for wearers sensitive to lens rigidity or mid-day dryness. 💰Value-Conscious Daily Wearers The 90-pack delivers the best cost-per-lens value for committed MyDay® wearers — 3-month supply per eye, fewer reorders, and supply security. 💻Screen & Office Users High water content and coating-free moisture retention support comfort through long screen days where blink rate drops and tear film is challenged without the need for rewetting drops. 🏃Active Lifestyles Daily disposables are the most hygienic lens format. The 90-pack provides ample stock so you always have a fresh lens available — no carrying cases or solution required. How to Use 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Open blister carefully — peel foil without squeezing. 3Check orientation — bowl shape = correct; flared edges = inside-out. Never insert inside-out. 4Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. Any discomfort? Remove and reinsert. 5No solution needed. Daily disposables require no case or cleaning solution. 6Remove before sleep and before swimming or showering. 7Discard after one day. Never reuse a daily disposable. Frequently Asked Questions Do I need lens solution for MyDay® 90 Pack? No — as a daily disposable, no cleaning solution or storage case is required. Open a fresh blister each morning and discard the lens at the end of the day. Where can I buy MyDay® 90 Pack? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. Can I swim while wearing MyDay® 90 Pack? No. Remove all contact lenses before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water exposure raises the risk of serious eye infection. Can I sleep in MyDay® 90 Pack? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  extended wear, do not sleep in daily lenses. This significantly increases infection and corneal damage risk. What is the current price? Visit the product page at contactlens365.com for the latest pricing and promotions. Subscribe to our newsletter for exclusive discounts. Is MyDay® 90 Pack suitable for astigmatism? The standard spherical version does not correct astigmatism. Ask your eye care professional about the toric version if you have an astigmatic . Why Shop at contactlens365.com? ✅ 100% Authentic Every product sourced exclusively from authorised distributors — zero  or expired lens risk. 🚀 Fast Dispatch Orders placed before cut-off ship same day. Real-time tracking from order to doorstep. 🛡️ Secure Payments , debit card, and other secure methods accepted. Your data always protected. 💬 Expert Support Our team is available 7 days a week for parameter selection, orders, and returns. 🔄 Auto-Reorder Subscribe and receive your lenses automatically — never run out again. ↩ Hassle-Free Returns Not satisfied? Our straightforward returns and exchange policy has you covered. myday 90 packcoopervision myday dailysmart silicone technologystenfilcon a lensaquaform technology dailydaily disposable 90 packcontactlens365myday specsmyday reviewscoopervision daily 90 pack This product page is prepared by contactlens365.com. CooperVision, MyDay, Smart Silicone, and Aquaform are trademarks of CooperVision Inc. or its affiliates. Always consult a qualified eye care professional before using contact lenses.

FDA-cleared comfort claim — PC Technology™ mimics natural cell-membrane chemistry to attract and retain moisture throughout the full 30-day replacement cycle. ✦ Monthly Disposable6 Lenses / BoxPC Technology™Omafilcon ABC 8.6 mm · Dia 14.2 mm MonthlyWear Type 6Lenses / Box 62%Water Content FDAComfort Claim ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns CooperVision Proclear® 6 Pack Contacts stands apart from every other monthly contact lens available at contactlens365.com for one compelling reason: it is the only monthly lens material cleared by the FDA with the specific claim that it "may provide improved comfort for contact lens wearers who experience mild discomfort or symptoms relating to dryness during lens wear." This is not a marketing statement — it is a clinically validated, regulatory-cleared claim that reflects genuine differentiation in how the lens interacts with the eye's natural chemistry. The foundation of Proclear® is PC Technology™ — the incorporation of phosphorylcholine (PC) molecules into the omafilcon A hydrogel matrix. Phosphorylcholine is not a synthetic invention; it is one of the key molecules found in the phospholipid bilayer of human cell membranes, where it plays a central role in regulating hydration and preventing non-specific protein binding. By building this same molecule into the contact lens material, Proclear® creates a lens surface that the tear film and corneal tissue recognise as naturally compatible — resulting in reduced protein and lipid deposition, sustained surface wettability, and markedly improved comfort for wearers who have struggled with other monthly lenses. Proclear® is available in one of the widest  ranges in the monthly category — up to –20.00 D for myopia and +20.00 D for hyperopia — making it one of the few premium monthly options for wearers with extreme prescriptions. A toric version (Proclear® Toric) is also available for astigmatism. At contactlens365.com, all parameters are stocked for prompt dispatch. Always confirm your current  with your eye care professional before ordering. 🔬 Proclear® carries an FDA-cleared comfort claim — the only monthly contact lens with this distinction. PC Technology™ integrates phosphorylcholine into the lens material itself, creating a naturally biocompatible surface that stays moist all day and throughout the full replacement cycle. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Material Omafilcon A (Hydrogel) Water Content 62% Base Curve (BC) 8.6 mm Diameter 14.2 mm Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 22.9 UV Protection None Power Range (SPH) –20.00 to +20.00 D Replacement Schedule Monthly (30 days) Pack Contents 6 Lenses Manufacturer CooperVision Key Technology PC Technology™ Phosphorylcholine (PC) molecules — the same found in human cell membranes — are embedded throughout the omafilcon A material. This creates a surface that naturally attracts and retains water, is inherently biocompatible, and resists protein and lipid deposition that causes discomfort in conventional hydrogel lenses. The FDA recognised this technology as clinically significant enough to clear a formal comfort claim — unique among monthly lenses. Omafilcon A A conventional hydrogel polymer with 62% water content — one of the highest in the monthly category. The high water content combined with PC molecule integration creates a lens that feels naturally soft and moist, with a surface behaviour that is significantly more compatible with the tear film than conventional ionic hydrogels. Note: Dk/t of 22.9 is lower than silicone hydrogel alternatives — your eye care professional can advise on daily wearing hour suitability. Who Is It For? 👁️Dry Eye & Sensitive Eye Wearers FDA-cleared for improved comfort in mild dryness — PC Technology™ creates a naturally moist, biocompatible surface ideal for wearers who have struggled with other monthly lenses. 📋Wide  Range Available to –20.00 D and +20.00 D — one of the widest monthly ranges available, making Proclear® accessible to high- wearers with few premium monthly alternatives. 🔄Monthly Comfort Upgraders Wearers who find other monthlies uncomfortable by end-of-day or end-of-week regularly report Proclear® as materially more comfortable due to PC surface chemistry. 💊Clinically Recommended Wearers Often prescribed specifically by eye care professionals for patients experiencing mild contact lens-related dryness — backed by evidence recognised at regulatory level by the FDA. How to Use & Care 1Wash hands with soap and water. Dry with a lint-free towel. 2Inspect for tears or deformation. Confirm bowl orientation. Never insert damaged/inside-out lens. 3Insert gently onto cornea. Blink to settle. 4Clean after every removal — rub each surface with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse thoroughly. 5Store in fresh solution — always empty and refill case completely. Never top up old solution. 6Replace case every 1–3 months. Rinse daily with solution, wipe, air dry face-down. 7Replace on schedule — note opening date. Never extend wear beyond the replacement period. 8Remove before sleep unless eye doctor . Never swim or shower in lenses. Frequently Asked Questions How should I store Proclear® 6 Pack Contacts? After each use, rub both surfaces with multipurpose solution ≥5 seconds per side, rinse, store in fresh solution. Never use tap water or saliva. Where can I buy Proclear® 6 Pack Contacts? Order directly at contactlens365.com with competitive pricing, secure payment, and fast shipping. How long does one 6-pack last? A 6-lens box covers ~3 months for one eye (one lens per one month). Two boxes provide a full 3-month bilateral supply. Can I swim while wearing Proclear® 6 Pack Contacts? No. Remove before swimming, showering, or using a hot tub. Water contact raises serious infection risk. Can I sleep in Proclear® 6 Pack Contacts? Unless your eye doctor has specifically  overnight wear, do not sleep in contact lenses. The only daily disposable with an FDA-cleared dry eye comfort claim. 30 lenses per box — ideal for first-time users and part-time wearers. ✦ Daily Disposable 30 Lenses / Box PC Technology™ Omafilcon A · 60% H₂O FDA Dry Eye Claim Aspheric HD Optics DailyDisposable 60%Water Content 96%Hydration at 12h 90Lenses / Box ✓ 100% Genuine 📅 Expiry Date Checked 🚚 Fast Shipping 🔒 Secure Checkout ↩ Easy Returns Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack — Daily Disposable Contact Lens for Dry Eyes The CooperVision Proclear® 1-Day 30 Pack is a daily disposable hydrogel contact lens built around a single defining technology: PC Technology™ — a biocompatible material system that incorporates phosphorylcholine (PC) molecules directly into the lens structure to attract and lock water to the lens surface throughout the wearing day. It is the only daily disposable contact lens to carry an FDA-cleared claim that it may provide improved comfort for wearers who experience mild discomfort or symptoms relating to dryness during lens wear — a clinical distinction that no other daily disposable can make. Order Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack online at contactlens365.com with 100%  authenticity and fast same-day dispatch across all available powers. The 30-pack is the standard entry format for Proclear 1-Day — each box contains 30 lenses, providing a 1-month supply for one eye or a 15-day supply for both eyes together. It is the ideal choice for wearers trying Proclear 1-Day for the first time, those who wear lenses on a part-time basis, or anyone whose  may be due for review. For established full-time daily wearers of both eyes, the 90-pack at contactlens365.com delivers a lower per-lens cost and a 3-month supply in a single order. All available powers are stocked across the full range from –12.00 to +8.00 D for prompt dispatch. The aspheric optical design further enhances visual quality by correcting spherical aberration, delivering crisp, clear vision across all lighting conditions. 🏥 FDA-Cleared Dry Eye Claim: Proclear 1-Day is the only daily disposable contact lens with an FDA-cleared claim that it may provide improved comfort for wearers who experience mild discomfort or symptoms of dryness during lens wear. This clinical designation is backed by the biocompatibility and water-retention properties of PC Technology™. Technical Specifications Parameter Value Brand Name CooperVision Proclear® 1-Day Manufacturer CooperVision Material Omafilcon A (PC Hydrogel) Material Technology PC Technology™ (Phosphorylcholine) Water Content 60% Oxygen Transmissibility (Dk/t) 28 (at –3.00 D) Lens Design Aspheric — enhanced clarity & aberration correction Base Curve (BC) 8.7 mm Diameter (DIA) 14.2 mm Centre Thickness 0.09 mm (at –3.00 D) UV Protection None Handling Tint Yes (light visibility tint) Power Range (SPH) –12.00 to +8.00 D Astigmatism Correction No (spherical; see Proclear 1-Day for Astigmatism) Modality Daily disposable — single use, discard after each day Extended / Overnight Wear Not  — remove before sleep Pack Contents 30 Lenses FDA Claim Cleared for improved comfort in dry eye lens wearers Key Technology: PC Technology™ & Omafilcon A PC Technology™ PC Technology™ is CooperVision's proprietary material system incorporating phosphorylcholine (PC) molecules — the same type of molecule found naturally in the outer layer of healthy human cell membranes. These PC molecules are inherently water-loving: they attract water from the surrounding tear film and bind it to the lens surface, creating a sustained moisture shield that persists throughout the wearing day. Unlike surface coatings that are deposited on top of the lens and can wear away with blinking, the PC molecules are embedded within the Omafilcon A polymer itself — meaning the moisture-attracting property is permanent and consistent from first insertion to final removal. Omafilcon A · 60% H₂O Omafilcon A is the hydrogel material produced by CooperVision's PC Technology process. Its 60% water content — higher than most daily disposable hydrogels — contributes to the lens's soft, naturally moist feel on the eye. The material is biocompatible: it resists protein and lipid deposit accumulation, maintains its shape and optical properties throughout the wearing day, and remains 96% hydrated after 12 or more hours of continuous wear in clinical testing. The thin centre thickness of 0.09 mm contributes to the lens's comfortable, low-awareness feel from first insertion. Aspheric Optical Design Standard spherical contact lenses introduce spherical aberration — optical distortion that causes halos, glare, and reduced visual contrast, especially noticeable in dim lighting. Proclear 1-Day's aspheric design corrects this aberration by progressively flattening the lens curvature from centre to periphery, maintaining sharp focus quality across the full optical zone. The result is clearer, higher-contrast vision in all lighting conditions — an advantage that extends the lens's comfort and performance  from hydration to optical clarity. The combination of PC Technology's moisture-binding PC molecules, Omafilcon A's biocompatible high-water hydrogel, and the aspheric optical design explains why Proclear 1-Day consistently performs at the top of wearer comfort surveys — and why it holds the unique distinction of being the only daily disposable lens with FDA  for an improved comfort claim in dry eye lens wearers. Who Is Proclear 1-Day For? Proclear 1-Day was specifically engineered for wearers whose primary requirement from a daily lens is sustained comfort — particularly those who have experienced lens-related dryness, irritation, or end-of-day discomfort with other daily or monthly lenses. Its FDA comfort claim and 96% hydration retention make it uniquely suited to the following wearer profiles. 💧 Dry Eye & Comfort-Sensitive Wearers The FDA-cleared dry eye comfort claim is specific to Proclear lenses and no other daily disposable. PC Technology's phosphorylcholine moisture shield directly addresses the mechanism of lens-related dryness — maintaining 96% hydration at 12 hours — making Proclear 1-Day the clinically supported choice for wearers with lens-induced dryness symptoms. 💻 Screen-Heavy Professionals Prolonged screen use reduces blink rate significantly, accelerating tear film evaporation and lens surface drying. PC Technology's water-binding mechanism actively counteracts this process — maintaining lens hydration through long screen-based working days without requiring rewetting drops or lens removal. 🌬️ Air-Conditioned & Low-Humidity Environments Air conditioning, heating, and low-humidity environments accelerate lens dehydration. The PC molecules' continuous water-attracting action from the surrounding tear film is particularly effective in these conditions — sustaining comfort in environments where standard daily lenses become noticeably uncomfortable within hours. 🌙 Long-Day Wearers 96% hydration retained after 12+ hours means Proclear 1-Day is designed for extended daily wearing schedules. For wearers whose day regularly extends beyond 10–12 hours of lens wear, the sustained moisture performance of PC Technology provides consistent comfort that many competing daily hydrogels cannot maintain. 🧼 Hygiene-First & Allergy Wearers Daily replacement eliminates deposit accumulation, cleaning solution interactions, and case contamination entirely. For allergy sufferers — who are particularly susceptible to lens surface deposits triggering ocular reactions — Proclear 1-Day's biocompatible PC material and daily format are a clinically sound combination. 📋 Wide  Range SPH –12.00 to +8.00 D in 0.25 D steps (0.50 D steps at the extremes) covers a broad spectrum of myopic and hyperopic prescriptions, including higher powers that many daily lenses do not accommodate. The 90-pack provides a full 3-month supply per eye at a lower per-lens cost than the 30-pack equivalent. The Proclear® Daily Lens Family Proclear 1-Day is the spherical single-vision lens in CooperVision's Proclear daily range — all variants share the PC Technology™ Omafilcon A platform and its FDA-cleared dry eye comfort credential. The full family is available at contactlens365.com. This Product Proclear® 1-Day Daily spherical lens. PC Technology™, 60% water, aspheric design, FDA dry eye claim. –12.00 to +8.00 D. Available in 30 and 90-pack. Also Available Proclear® 1-Day for Astigmatism Daily toric for astigmatism. Same PC Technology platform with toric stabilisation design for cylindrical correction. Also Available Proclear® 1-Day Multifocal Daily multifocal for presbyopia. PC Technology comfort with centre-near aspheric design for near, intermediate, and distance vision. Daily Wear Guide — Proclear 1-Day As a daily disposable lens, Proclear 1-Day requires no cleaning or storage routine. Each lens is worn for one day and discarded. The following steps apply to every wearing day. 1Wash and dry your hands before every lens handling session. Use soap and water, then dry with a clean lint-free towel. Clean hands are essential — even a daily disposable lens can introduce pathogens if handled without proper hygiene. 2Open the blister carefully and inspect the lens. Check for tears or defects. The light handling tint makes the lens easy to see on your fingertip. Confirm the lens is right-side out — it should form a smooth, even bowl shape with edges curving inward. 3Insert gently and blink to centre. Place the lens on the cornea with lids held open, and blink normally to centre it. Proclear 1-Day's thin, soft Omafilcon A material adapts quickly and comfortably to the ocular surface — most wearers report immediate lens comfort from first insertion. 4Wear for one day only. Proclear 1-Day is a single-use daily disposable — each lens is designed, tested, and  for one day of wear. Never reuse, rinse and reinsert, or store a used lens. Remove and discard at the end of every wearing day without exception, regardless of comfort level. 5Remove before sleep and water exposure. Daily wear lenses are not  for overnight use. Always remove before sleeping, napping, swimming, or showering. All water sources carry micro-organisms that can cause serious eye infections on a contact lens surface. 6Discard after removal. Once removed, the lens is finished — dispose of it immediately. Each sealed blister pack provides one sterile, fresh lens for each new day, eliminating the deposit accumulation, cleaning chemistry, and case contamination risks of reusable lenses entirely. 💡 Dry eye tip: If you experience persistent dryness or discomfort even with Proclear 1-Day, this may indicate a clinical dry eye condition that requires assessment beyond a lens change. Proclear 1-Day is cleared for wearers with mild lens-related dryness symptoms — moderate to severe dry eye disease requires evaluation by an eye care professional who can recommend appropriate management alongside or instead of contact lens wear. Frequently Asked Questions — Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack What is PC Technology™ and how does it work? PC Technology™ is CooperVision's proprietary lens material system that incorporates phosphorylcholine (PC) molecules into the Omafilcon A hydrogel structure. Phosphorylcholine is the same molecule found on the outer surface of healthy human cell membranes — it is inherently biocompatible and strongly water-attracting. In the Proclear lens, PC molecules bind to water from the surrounding tear film and hold it against the lens surface, forming a persistent moisture shield. Unlike surface coatings that are applied to the lens and degrade during wear, the PC molecules are part of the polymer itself — so the moisture-attracting property remains constant throughout the entire wearing day. What is the FDA dry eye claim for Proclear lenses? Proclear 1-Day carries FDA  for the claim that it may provide improved comfort for contact lens wearers who experience mild discomfort or symptoms relating to dryness during lens wear. This is a specific, regulated clinical claim — not general marketing language. No other daily disposable contact lens holds this FDA . It reflects the clinical evidence supporting PC Technology's effectiveness in maintaining hydration and reducing lens-related dryness symptoms. It applies to mild lens-induced dryness; wearers with diagnosed dry eye disease should consult their eye care professional for personalised management. How long does one Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack last? One 30-lens box provides a 1-month supply for one eye, based on daily wear (one lens per day). For both eyes worn daily, two boxes — one per eye — cover a full month. If you wear lenses part-time, one box will last considerably longer. For regular full-time daily wearers of both eyes, the 90-pack at contactlens365.com offers a lower per-lens cost and 3 months of supply per eye in a single order. Can I reuse Proclear 1-Day lenses? No. Proclear 1-Day is a daily disposable lens  and designed for one day of wear only. Reusing the lens — even after rinsing — introduces deposit accumulation, microbial contamination, and infection risk. The PC Technology's moisture performance is also optimised for single-day use. Remove and discard each lens at the end of every wearing day without exception. Does Proclear 1-Day have UV protection? No. Proclear 1-Day does not include UV-blocking capability. If UV protection is important for your lifestyle, discuss options with your eye care professional. Note that no contact lens provides complete UV protection — UV-blocking sunglasses should always be worn alongside any contact lens for full outdoor UV protection. Can Proclear 1-Day correct astigmatism or presbyopia? The standard Proclear 1-Day spherical lens corrects myopia and hyperopia only. CooperVision also offers Proclear 1-Day for Astigmatism (toric daily) and Proclear 1-Day Multifocal (daily presbyopia lens), both using the same PC Technology platform. All variants are available at contactlens365.com. Is Proclear 1-Day a silicone hydrogel lens? No. Proclear 1-Day is made from Omafilcon A — a conventional hydrogel (PC Hydrogel), not a silicone hydrogel. Its Dk/t of 28 is lower than silicone hydrogel daily lenses, which typically range from 42 to 100+ Dk/t. However, for daily wear lenses worn for single days, clinical research indicates that a Dk/t of 24 or above is generally sufficient to maintain corneal health during daily wear. The distinctive advantage of Proclear 1-Day is not oxygen performance but its unique PC Technology moisture-binding system and FDA dry eye comfort claim. What power range is available in Proclear 1-Day? Proclear 1-Day is available from –12.00 D to +8.00 D. Powers from –6.00 to +5.00 D are available in 0.25 D steps. Powers beyond these values are available in 0.50 D steps. This is a notably wide range that includes many higher powers not available in competing daily disposable lenses. What is the current price for Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack? For current pricing and any active promotions, visit the Proclear 1-Day 30 Pack product page at contactlens365.com.
